title: Alexander Ramlie’s estate planning revealed, AMMN’s price soars
body: The stock price of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) went up 5.29% until the end of today’s (26/6) afternoon session.

title: Profit declined, MUTU stays true to its promise of 30% dividend allocation
body: PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk (MUTU) fulfils its promise stated in its IPO prospectus last year by allocating dividend of 30.45% of its 2023 net profit despite 15.8% year-on-year (yoy) contraction.

title: PMMP to hold rights issue of 905.90 million shares
body: PT Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk (PMMP) will hold a rights issue of a maximum 905.90 million shares of IDR 100 each.

title: Up 20%, MDKI to distribute dividend of IDR 30.36 billion
body: PT Emdeki Utama Tbk (MDKI) increases its dividend by 20% to IDR 30.36 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 from IDR 25.30 billion for FY 2022.

title: Panin Sekuritas to share cash dividend of IDR 128.05 billion
body: PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk (PANS), a security company of PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN), plans a cash dividend distribution worth IDR 128.05 billion or IDR 180 per share.

title: SAPX secures revolving loan of IDR 125 billion
body: PT Satria Antaran Prima Tbk (SAPX) managed to obtain a revolving loan facility of IDR 125 billion from PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) yesterday (25/6).

title: Waskita Karya to inject IDR 10 billion for Kapal Betung Toll Road
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), through its subsidiary, PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), has channelled extra capital worth IDR 10 billion to PT Waskita Sriwijaya Toll (WST), a business entity that owns the concession of Kayu Agung–Palembang–Betung (Kapal Betung) Toll Road.

title: Trimegah Bangun Persada to raise buyback budget to IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) has increased the allocated fund for share buyback to IDR 1 trillion from the initial IDR 400 billion.

title: Continuing to release Totalindo (TOPS) shares, Deputy Attorney General for Special Crimes now only holds 5.79 percent
body: The Deputy Attorney General for Special Crimes of the Prosecutor's Office of the Republic of Indonesia had not stopped selling shares of PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk (TOPS), an issuer of building construction. On Friday, June 21, this investor released an additional 70 million shares, bringing its total number of shares held to 1.93 billion, or approximately 5.79%. Besides that, Tan John Tanuwijaya, the majority shareholder in PT Berdikari Pondasi Perkasa Tbk (BDKR), was still selling shares, this time for 27.54 million. His share percentage was recorded as being around 58.89%. PT Precise Pacific Realty was also recorded as selling 20 million shares of the tourism services company PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk (SONA), with the remaining shares amounting to approximately 31.65%.

title: Distribute financing to 900 thousand MSMEs, KoinWorks launches Impact Report 2023
body: KoinWorks, a peer-to-peer (P2P) lending fintech that was founded in 2016, has just launched the 2023 Impact Report which displays the company's social impact throughout 2023 after distributing financing facilities to more than 900 thousand MSMEs (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises).

title: PBRX in PKPU status
body: Commercial Court of Central Jakarta approved the plea of Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (PKPU) over PT Pan Brothers Tbk (PBRX) submitted by PT Januardi Putera Logistik (JPL).

title: Kedoya Adyaraya to set up final dividend of IDR 10.22 billion
body: PT Kedoya Adyaraya Tbk (RSGK), the operator of Grha Kedoya Hospital and Grha MM2100 Hospital, will distribute final dividend of IDR 10.22 billion or IDR 11 per share.

title: Tan John Tanuwijaya now only owns 62.45% of Berdikari Foundation (BDKR)
body: Tan John Tanuwijaya, the controlling shareholder in the foundation specialty company PT Berdikari Pondasi Perkasa Tbk (BDKR), released an additional 34.36 million shares on Tuesday, June 11. This investor's shareholding continues to fall as a result of his regular share sales; only 62.45% remains.

title: Net foreign volume stuck in red zone with -1.22 billion shares
body: The net foreign volume remained in the red zone, on Wednesday, June 12, totaling -1.22 billion shares. This figure was obtained from the difference in foreign buying volume, which was only 3 billion shares, and foreign selling volume, which reached 4.23 billion shares. The most shares sold belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely 2.29 billion shares, with a net volume of -703.12 million shares.

title: Prajogo Pangestu acquires two billion Barito Pacific (BRPT) shares
body: Prajogo Pangestu, the controlling shareholder of PT Barito Pacific Tbk (BRPT), added another 2 billion shares of the company, which operates in the energy and industrial sectors, to his holdings on Monday, June 10. Prajogo previously held approximately 69.05% of the shares but now owns 71.19%. Prajogo purchased shares through two securities companies: BUT Standard Chartered Bank and PT Bahana Sekuritas.

title: Foreign selling volume surpasses 4 billion shares, net foreign volume drops to -1.13 billion shares
body: Share sales by foreign investors on Tuesday, June 11, resulted in foreign selling volume reaching 4.06 billion shares. In addition, foreign investors also carried out share purchase transactions and recorded a foreign purchase volume of 2.93 billion shares. This huge disparity caused net foreign volume to drop to -1.13 billion shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) is still ranked #1 on the top sell list, having sold 2.22 billion shares for a net volume of -762.99 million.

title: Reliancever Holdings invest in two MNC Group issuers
body: After becoming a new PT MNC Kapital (BCAP) investor, Reliancever Holdings Inc. entered two other MNC Group issuers on Friday, June 7. First, this foreign investor bought 9.16 billion shares of the issuer, which operates in the office space rental sector, PT MNC Land Tbk (KPIG), which accounted for around 9.39% of the shares. Furthermore, approximately 5.79 billion shares of PT MNC Asia Holding Tbk (BHIT), a holding company in the investment sector, were purchased, resulting in 6.74% ownership. Even so, Reliance decided to sell approximately 96.19 million shares of financial services company BACP this time. All transactions were conducted through PT MNC Sekuritas.

title: Investor: OJK and IDX failed to exercise optimum supervision towards TIFA
body: Retail investors highlighted OJK and the stock exchange authority’s lack of effort in protecting investors towards PT KDB Tifa Finance Tbk (TIFA) with its free float rate of only 0.35% and the lack of dividend distribution in the past 5 years.

title: SCCO saw 103% surge in dividend
body: The dividend of PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk (SCCO) soared 103% to IDR 61.67 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 although the profit slightly declined from 2022.

title: Cipta Perdana Lancar to hold IPO, offer 25% shares
body: PT Cipta Perdana Lancar Tbk (PART), a spare part and automotive component manufacturer, will issue 680 million of its shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) through an initial public offering (IPO).

title: GOTO reported the furthest drop among BUKA and BELI
body: PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), the managing company of Gojek platform, reported the most significant drop amongst two of its competitors in e-commerce application industry.

title: Expanding all business lines, Moratelindo to set up capex of IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Mora Telematika Indonesia Tbk (MORA), more popularly known as Moratelindo, is budgeting capital expenditure (capex) worth IDR 1 trillion for 2024.

title: GOTO denies terminating 80% of Tokopedia’s services
body: PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) denies the information regarding the company’s plan to stop up to 80% of Tokopedia’s service, its e-commerce platform, in the near future.

title: RMKE net profit declines 64.48% in first quarter
body: PT RMK Energy Tbk (RMKE), an issuer providing coal transportation services, only posted a net profit of IDR 44.58 billion in the first quarter (Q1) 2024. This profit decreased by 64.48% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same quarter last year.

title: Salim Group to acquire land of 18,290 Ha in Padalarang
body: PT Inti Cakrawala Citra (ICC), a Salim Group company, is acquiring a land of 18,290 hectares (Ha) for IDR 80 billion in Padalarang, West Java, from PT Falmaco Nonwoven Industri Tbk (FLMC).

title: Three textile companies suffered capital deficiency
body: Several issuers in the garment and textile industries have reportedly been at capital deficiency throughout 2023.

title: In need of extra capital, Bank Victoria International to issue bond of IDR 500 billion
body: PT Bank Victoria International Tbk (BVIC) will issue its Shelf-Registration Subordinated Bond III of BVIC Phase I Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 500 million.

title: Unilever Indonesia divests assets for IDR 57.6 billion
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR) has divested its asset, which is an ice cream production machine, for a transaction value worth EUR 3.27 million or equal to approximately IDR 57.6 billion.

title: Indonesia Kendaraan Terminal to channel out dividend of IDR 113.45 billion, up 25%
body: PT Indonesia Kendaraan Terminal Tbk (IPCC), an operator of Tanjung Priok port, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 113.45 billion taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: Last SUN auction’s incoming bids hit IDR 42.96 trillion
body: The total incoming bids in the auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) last Tuesday, June 11, 2024, reached IDR 42.96 trillion.

title: Utama Radar Cahaya to distribute stock dividend of IDR 5.43 billion
body: PT Utama Radar Cahaya Tbk (RCCC), a logistics and shipping company debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) circa 2022, will distribute cash dividend worth IDR 5.43 billion.

title: TRIM to issue Bonds of IDR 388 billion
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond I Phase II Year 2024 worth IDR 388 billion in the next couple of weeks, from June 25 to 26, 2024.

title: Preparing for potential demand increase, SUNI to set up factory operating in Q1 2025
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI) is focusing the allocation of capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 327 billion for the construction of the second factory of PT Rainbow Tubulars Manufacture (RTM), its subsidiary, in Batam, in 2024.

title: The net foreign volume plunges to -3.14 billion shares as many GOTO shares released
body: On Monday, June 10, foreign investors sold a considerable number of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). A total of 5.18 billion GOTO shares were sold, for a net volume of -2.60 billion shares. These share sales therefore significantly boosted foreign sales volume, which rose to 6.99 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only 3.85 billion shares, causing the net foreign volume to drop to -3.14 billion shares.

title: Singapore Govt acquires 1.15 billion shares of Bank Jago (ARTO)
body: On Thursday, June 6, the Government of Singapore acquired 1.15 billion shares of digital banking company PT Bank Jago Tbk (ARTO) via Citibank N.A. and BUT Standard Chartered Bank. This new investor gained approximately 8.34% of ARTO shares as a result of this purchase. A new investor, Yasir Arafat Rumagiar, has also recently entered the chicken farming and slaughterhouse issuer PT Janu Putra Sejahtera Tbk (AYAM), purchasing 201.63 million shares. This individual investor immediately owns 5.04% of the shares.

title: Stock dropped 620% since IPO, GOTO sets up IDR 32 trillion for buyback
body: Shareholders of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) agreed upon the allocation of IDR 32 trillion worth of budget to repurchase the issued shares (buyback).

title: SUNI to distribute dividend of IDR 11 billion this July
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI), an OCTG pipe manufacturer, is preparing to distribute dividend of IDR 11 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 on July 12, 2024.

title: ZYRX’s dividend down 58.19% due to profit slippage
body: The dividend of PT Zyrexindo Mandiri Buana Tbk (ZYRX) for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 shrank 58.19% compared to the same period in 2022.

title: Securing portion in VLS, UANG channels IDR 220.65 billion
body: PT Pakuan Tbk (CUAN) channels capital worth IDR 220.65 billion for 441,303 shares of IDR 500 thousand each in PT Vasamty Land Sawangan (VLS), its joint venture established alongside Samty Asia Investments Pte Ltd (SAI).

title: Adding new business line, CMRY to invest IDR 292.58 billion
body: PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy Tbk (CMRY) sets up investment of IDR 292.58 billion to add 14 new business lines.

title: Nearly a year debuting, AMMN saw 582.30% surge in stock price
body: As of yesterday (11/6), the stock of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) soared 582.03% since its debut in the stock market on July 7, 2023.

title: Acquiring Probiotec, PYFA’s subsidiary receives IDR 1.07 trillion
body: PYFA Australia Pty Ltd (PAPL), an entity under PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA), has secured extra capital of USD 99.57 million or equal to approximately IDR 1.07 trillion.

title: DEPO to share dividend of IDR 27.16 billion, 73.9% higher now
body: PT Caturkarda Depo Bangunan Tbk (DEPO), a retail company specialized in building materials, is planning a cash dividend distribution of IDR 27.16 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: Concluding IPO, Benteng Api Technic to acquireland for IDR 24.9 billion
body: PT Benteng Api Technic Tbk (BATR), a fire resistant material and heat insulation manufacturer, has conducted several assets in the form of land and building to support operational activities.

title: Ace Hardware to share cash dividend of IDR 573.53 billion
body: PT Ace Hardware Tbk (ACES), a retail company under Kawan Lama Group, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 573.53 billion or IDR 33.5 per share taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: SSIA divested 2% of SCS for IDR 169.81 billion
body: PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk (SSIA) is divesting 2% or 55.80 million of its shares in PT Suryacipta Swadaya (SCS) for IDR 169.81 billion to PT Puri Bumi Lestari (PBL).

title: Eyeing 7% growth, DVLA prepares capex of IDR 209 billion
body: PT Darya-Varia Laboratoria Tbk (DVLA) is reportedly preparing capital expenditure (capex) budget worth IDR 209 billion for 2024, which will mostly be allocated for expansion.

title: Distributing another IDR 65, Darya-Varia’s dividend clocks up to IDR 108 per share
body: PT Darya-Varia Laboratoria Tbk (DVLA) sets up IDR 65 per share for the final dividend of the fiscal year (FY) 2023, totalling IDR 72.8 billion, which will be taken out of its current year’s net profit in 2023.

title: NISP and Bank Commonwealth to merge this year
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) and PT Bank Commonwealth (BC) will merge after completing 100% of the acquisition of BC’s shares.

title: Sariguna Primatirta to establish another subsidiary, focusing on ice
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO) has established a new subsidiary called PT Stube Segarkan Indonesia (SSI), with a business line with the focus on ice production.

title: Securing fresh funds, PTRO now starts its climb
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) was seen climbing 11% in the morning session after securing capital funds from PT Kreasi Jasa Persada (KJP), a subsidiary of PT Petrindo Jasa Kreasi Tbk (CUAN), last week (7/6).

title: Reliancever Holdings invests 2.49 billion shares in MNC Kapital (BCAP)
body: Reliancever Holdings Inc., a foreign company based in the British Virgin Islands, purchased up to 2.49 billion shares of PT MNC Kapital Indonesia Tbk (BCAP) on Wednesday, June 5. Following this transaction with PT MNC Sekuritas, Reliancever became the newest holder of the financial services company's shares by 5.85%.

title: Debuting, Tanoko’s Hebel manufacturer to issue 15.05% of shares in IPO
body: PT Superior Prima Sukses Tbk (BLES), a Hebel and mortar manufacturer based in Surabaya, plans to issue 1.31 billion shares in Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: INCO to allocate capex of IDR 1.46 trillion from rights issue proceeds
body: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) is allocating 79.34% or IDR 1.46 trillion of total rights issue proceeds, which involves the issuance of 603.4 million shares on the next two weeks (24/6).

title: Bank Syariah Indonesia to offer sukuk mudharabah of IDR 3 trillion
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), a state-owned sharia bank, is aiming to score fresh funds of IDR 3 trillion through the issuance of Shelf-Registration Sukuk Mudharabah I Phase I Year 2024.

title: Puradelta Lestari distributes cash dividend of IDR 578 billion, up 19.9%
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), a real estate management and developer, is issuing cash dividend of IDR 578 billion or IDR 12 per share for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: KEEN to channel dividend of IDR 27 billion
body: PT Kencana Energi Lestari Tbk (KEEN) will distribute dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 27.67 billion, higher than IDR 23.83 billion seen in FY 2022.

title: Continuing land acquisition, PWON spent IDR 121.7 billion
body: PT Pakuwon Permai (PP), a subsidiary of PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON), is acquiring a land of 52,040 hectares (Ha) in Semarang, Central Java, worth IDR 121.7 billion.

title: Optimistic, VAST targets 30% revenue growth
body: After concluding the acquisition of a warehouse in Tangerang last year, PT Vastland Indonesia Tbk (VAST), a developer focusing in logistics and warehousing, is targeting its revenue to grow 30% year-on-year (yoy) in 2024.

title: Atlantis Subsea Indonesia obtains 2 new contracts from Timas Suplindo
body: PT Atlantis Subsea Indonesia Tbk (ATLA), a maritime survey and inspection company debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) last April, has already secured 2 new contracts from Timas Suplindo.

title: Divesting portion in PYFA, RGI rakes in IDR 5.09 billion
body: Rejuve Global Investment (RGI) Pte Ltd secures IDR 56.09 billion from divesting 3.56% of PT Pyridam Farma Tbk’s (PYFA) shares alst week (6/6).

title: JKON to set up dividend of IDR 69.31 billion, an increase from last year
body: PT Jaya Konstruksi Manggala Pratama Tbk (JKON) is allocating 29.18% or IDR 69.31 billion of total net profit in 2023, of IDR 237.47 billion, as dividend.

title: Soraya Berjaya Indonesia to offer 240 million shares in IPO
body: PT Soraya Berjaya Indonesia Tbk (SPRE), a bed cover and household equipment manufacturer, will issue 240 million of its shares through initial public offering (IPO).

title: Profit down 35.6%, Mega Perintis’s dividend shrank
body: PT Mega Perintis Tbk (ZONE), a company engaged in the fashion production and retail, only distributed cash dividend of IDR 14.05 billion or IDR 16.15 per share taken out of its net profit in 2023.

title: Strengthening capital structure, BPD Jabar to issue Bond of IDR 3 trillion
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR), starting this June, will issue its Subordinated Bond Year 2024 worth IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: PTPP obtains IDR 8.9 trillion new contracts until May 2024
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), a state-owned construction and investment company, has secured new contracts worth IDR 8.9 trillion since the beginning of this year until May 2024 (5M).

title: Opening bell saw JCI sank to the red zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index slowed down towards the red zone on Monday (10/6) morning.

title: Foreign buy volume failed to reach 2 billion, net foreign volume closed at 449.64 million shares
body: Foreign share purchases on Friday, June 7, fell short of 2 billion shares, hovering around 1.94 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign selling volume was 2.39 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -449.64 million shares. Following the sale of 265.03 million shares, the banking business PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) had the greatest net volume in the top sell list at -204.73 million shares.

title: Gojek Tokopedia share sales contributed 50% of foreign sales volume
body: On Thursday, June 6, sales of digital firm share at PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) accounted for 50% of total foreign sales volume (3.07 billion shares), with foreign investors selling 1.51 billion shares for a net volume of -849.93 million shares. Foreign buying volume was 2.14 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -935.91 million shares.

title: CHIP’s dividend grew 32.9%; market cap soared 1,002%
body: The dividend of PT Pelita Teknologi Global Tbk (CHIP) increased 32.09% in the fiscal year (FY) 2023 from the FY 2022.

title: Indonesia Fibreboard Industry readies cash dividend of IDR 47.06 billion
body: PT Indonesia Fibreboard Industry Tbk (IFII) will distribute cash dividend of IDR 47.06 billion or IDR 5 per share taken out of its net profit of 2023.

title: AMMN’s market cap surpasses BREN
body: Market capitalisation of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) arrives at the runner-up spot in Top 10 Market Cap in the stock exchange following the decline of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) due to full call auction (FCA) system.

title: SUN auction is back next week, eyeing IDR 22 trillion this time
body: The Indonesian government will once again conduct an auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Tuesday (11/6) with an indicated target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: No dividend planned; these are HRUM’s plan in nickel sector
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) of PT Harum Energy Tbk (HRUM) today (7/6) agreed not to distribute dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023, ending its 3-year streak of dividend distribution since 2021.

title: BREN stumbled again; market cap dropped by IDR 86.96 trillion
body: Stock price of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) plummeted 9.70% from IDR 6,700 to IDR 6,050 until the closing day of today’s (7/6) morning session.

title: Indomobil Finance will issue bonds worth IDR 2.83 trillion
body: PT Indomobil Finance Indonesia, a financing venture under PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk (IMJS), will issue Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase III Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 2.83 trillion.

title: Jaya Real Property readies dividend of IDR 330 billion
body: PT Jaya Real Property Tbk (JRPT), a real estate developer and management, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 330 billion or IDR 24 per share.

title: Shareholders approve PUDP’s stock split plan with 1:2 ratio
body: PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk (PUDP) prepares a stock split with ratio set to 1:2 at the beginning of July 2024 after securing approval from shareholders during its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders last Thursday (6/6).

title: SPTO to share dividend of IDR 135 billion
body: PT Surya Pertiwi Tbk (SPTO) distributes dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 worth IDR 135 billion, relatively stable compared to the dividend for FY 2022.

title: Out of monitoring board, INPP works on bond issuance in second half of 2024
body: As of May 27, 2024, PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) is no longer listed under Special Monitoring Board of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX), and is now entering the Development Board.

title: Transcoal Pacific put old boats on sale, now divesting 1 unit for IDR 8 billion
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) has reportedly divested 1 unit of motor vessels called Varuna 01 for a transaction value worth IDR 8 billion.

title: ULTJ listed as top gainers
body: The stock of PT Ultra Jaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk (ULTJ) rose 6.67%, arriving as one of Top 10 Gainers in yesterday’s (6/6) session.

title: Alam Sutera retains earnings of IDR 639.1 billion
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) of PT Alam Sutera Realty Tbk (ASRI) agreed to hold off net profit of 2023 of IDR 639.1 billion as retained earnings.

title: JCI slowed down throughout the day
body: Jakarta Composite Index has yet to rebound during today’s (6/6) session to its position seen earlier this week (3-4/6) at above 7,000. Today, the shift is relatively slow compared to yesterday.

title: Pudjiadi Prestige to ready dividend of IDR 10 per share late June
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of PT Pudjiadi Prestige Tbk (PUDP) approved the plan of dividend distribution of IDR 10 per share for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: Indonesian Paradise Property to start Balikpapan project next year
body: Joining the hype in IKN, PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) is getting ready to start its latest project in Balikpapan, which is revealed to be a hotel.

title: MNC Kapital issues bond worth IDR 390 billion
body: PT MNC Kapital Indonesia Tbk (BCAP) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 390 billion.

title: Ace Hardware to spend IDR 30 billion for digital platform
body: PT Ace Hardware Tbk (ACES), a special retailer under Kawan Lama Group, has channelled extra capital worth IDR 30 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Omni Digitama Internusa (ODI).

title: Megapratama Karya annexes 10% of Siloam Hospitals' (SILO) shares
body: On Tuesday, June 4, market hints began with PT Megapratama Karya Persada purchasing 1.35 billion shares of health service provider PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO). Following the completion of the transaction facilitated by PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia, this new investor received an immediate share ownership of 10.4%. On the other hand, the controller of PT Hotel Candi Baru made a large-scale share reduction by selling 7.84 billion shares of the herbal medicine and pharmaceutical company PT Industri Jamu Dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO). This investor previously owned 68.14% but now only owns approximately 42%.

title: Net foreign volume remains in red zone at -513.29 million shares
body: Foreign selling volume on Wednesday, June 5, was still larger at 3.03 billion shares than foreign buying volume, which was 2.51 billion. As a result, net foreign volume remained unchanged in the red zone, closing at -513.29 million shares. The telecoms business PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) had the most shares purchased, with 110.02 million shares and a net volume of 30.24 million shares. Meanwhile, the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) continued to hold the most shares sold, with 967.83 million shares and a net volume of -123.56 million shares.

title: Full call auction in effect, BREN’s market cap cut by IDR 608.72 trillion
body: The stock price of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) continues to decline under watchlist board following full call auction (FCA) policy that was put in place last week (29/5).

title: AMMN consistently reach top three in market cap
body: PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN)'s market capitalization (market cap) climbed to the top three in Top Market Capitalization as of May 2024.

title: IMG Sejahtera Langgeng secures syndicated loan of USD 450 million
body: PT IMG Sejahtera Langgeng, a subsidiary of Indomobil Group, has received syndicated loan worth USD 450 million in order to support electric vehicle (EV) development.

title: Digital Mediatama Maxima to offer 432.87 million treasury shares
body: PT Digital Mediatama Maxima Tbk (DMMX), an information technology (IT) service and consultancy, will sell off 432.87 million shares or 5.63% of the shares gained from a buyback.

title: Increasing liquidity, Merdeka Battery Materials to conduct rights issue of 10%
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA), a nickel mining company under PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), plans to issue 10% of new shares under rights issue scheme to increase liquidity.

title: Net foreign volume drops to -1.18 billion shares
body: Foreign share sales appear to have increased on Tuesday, June 4 but were not followed by share purchases. The gap between the foreign buying volume of 3.26 billion shares and foreign selling volume of 4.45 billion shares resulted in net foreign volume falling to -1.18 billion shares. PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares remained in first place in the top sell list, unchanged from the previous day, with 2.25 billion shares sold and a net volume of -1.24 billion shares.

title: Profit declined, BMHS saw lowest dividend in the past three years
body: PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS), the managing company of Rumah Sakit Bunda Hospital network, only distributes cash dividend of IDR 0.56 per share or IDR 4.82 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: JCI spends the day at red zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index must spend the entire day in the red zone until the closing bell today (5/6), ending its robust strides for two consecutive days in the green zone since earlier this Monday (3/6).

title: PPRO suffered loss, no dividend in sight
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO) agreed not to distribute dividend to shareholders following a loss recorded in 2023 of IDR 1.28 trillion.

title: MNC Media released 335 million MNC Digital (MSIN) shares
body: On Monday, June 3, media holding company PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk (MNC Media) released approximately 335.81 million shares of one of its digital media subsidiaries, PT MNC Digital Entertainment Tbk (MSIN). This investor released up to 2.5% of his share ownership through PT MNC Sekuritas, leaving it with only 5.5%.

title: Sinar Nusantara acquires 5.94% stake in Resources Alam (KKGI)
body: At the end of May, the coal mining company PT Resource Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI) welcomed a new foreign investor, Sinar Nusantara Sdn Bhd. On Friday, May 31, approximately 296.96 million shares of this coal mining company were purchased, making Sinar Nusantara the new owner of 5.94% of the shares. In addition, Dimas Adiarso Putro purchased 53.78 million shares of PT Anugerah Spareparts Sejahtera Tbk (AEGS), an issuer in the motor vehicle filter industry, to acquire a new 5.35% stake.

title: Foreign investors sell Gojek Tokopedia shares, net foreign volume closed at -965.20 million shares
