body: PT Charoen Pokhpand Indonesia Tbk (CPIN) has set aside IDR 2.13 trillion as cash dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023, which are equal to approximately 91.94% of 2023 net profit.

title: Multi Medika Internasional secures facility of IDR 80 billion from Bank Aladin Syariah
body: PT Multi Medika Internasional Tbk (MMIX), a distributor and manufacturer of health devices and equipment, has secured a credit facility from PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk (BANK) with ceiling set to IDR 80 billion.

title: Wika Gedung to share cash dividend of IDR 9,38 billion
body: PT Wika Gedung Tbk (WEGE), a building construction subsidiary of WIKA, is scheduling a cash dividend distribution worth IDR 9.38 billion or IDR 0.98 per share.

title: Barito Renewables Energy now listed in FTSE Global Equity Index
body: PT Barito Renewables Energi Tbk (BREN), a renewable energy company under Barito Pacific Group, has entered FTSE Global Equity Index under the category of the highest market capitalisation in June 2024.

title: PRAY’s net profit soared 305%, yet no dividend in sight
body: PT Famon Awal Bros Sedaya Tbk (PRAY), the managing company of Awal Bros Hospital, now Primaya Hospital, decided not to distribute dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 despite its profit skyrocketing 305% from FY 2022.

title: Foreign-sell exceeds 5 billion shares, resulting in net foreign volume of -773.48 million
body: On Tuesday, May 21, foreign share sales transactions reached 5.59 billion shares. Apart from that, share purchases were also significant, although the foreign buy only totaled 4.82 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume concluded at -773.48 million shares. The most shares sold belonged to PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) in the banking sector, namely 195.45 million shares, with a net volume of -66.40 million shares.

title: MB Investment purchased 1.77 billion ITSEC Asia shares, giving it a direct 27.49% ownership
body: On Monday, May 20, foreign company MB Investment Management Pte Ltd made a new investment in PT ITSEC Asia Tbk (CYBR) by purchasing approximately 1.77 billion shares. The transaction, facilitated by PT OCBC Sekuritas Indonesia, gave the Singaporean investor immediate control of 27.49%. Another foreign investor, Rejuve Global Investment Pte Ltd, then increased its stake in pharmaceutical company PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA) by nearly 50 million shares.

title: Hillcon Equity stake in Hillcon (HILL) doubled
body: On Friday, May 17, PT Hillcon Equity Management increased its stake in mining holding company PT Hillcon Tbk (HILL) by two-fold. Previously, Hillcon Equity controlled approximately 33.04% of the shares; however, this investor added 851.38 million shares, increasing its share portion to 61.92%. The investor carried out this transaction using three different securities: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk, BUT Deutsche Bank AG, and PT CGS International Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: Foreign investors purchase Gojek Tokopedia shares; net foreign volume recorded surplus 434.01 million
body: On Monday, May 20, foreign investors purchased up to 1.07 billion shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 109.07 million shares. This transaction boosted foreign buying volume to 3.51 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales totaled around 3.08 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 434.01 million shares.

title: Gov’t to set up yet another SUN auction, aiming IDR 22 trillion next week
body: The Indonesian government is once again holding the auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) next Tuesday (28/5) with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: Samuel Tumbuh Bersama acquires 1.1 billion shares of Nusantara Sawit (NSSS)
body: After collecting 1.7 billion shares of PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS) on the previous trading day, PT Samuel Tumbuh Bersama increased its stake in this palm oil producer by 1.1 billion shares. On Thursday, May 16, the shareholding of this investor's shares increased from 7.19% to 11.81%. On the other hand, PT Mitra Agro Dharma Unggul, the owner of 37% of NSSS, reduced its shareholding by 1.1 billion shares, leaving it with approximately 32.54%.

title: PSSI to set up dividend of IDR 251.06 billion
body: PT IMC Pelita Logistik Tbk (PSSI) sets up dividend of the fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 215.06 billion, which will be distributed on June 20, referring to the recording date of Official Register of Shareholders on June 3.

title: MPMX to join EV business hype
body: PT Mitra Pinasthika Mustika Tbk (MPMX) and its subsidiary, PT Mitra Pinasthika Mulia, will branch out to support electric vehicle (EV) business.

title: Citi Indonesia continues to grow, profit jumps 17% in Q1 2024
body: Citibank N.A. Indonesia, or better known as Citi Indonesia, recorded an increase in net profit of up to 17% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 665.9 billion at the end of March 2024 from IDR 568.71 billion in Q1 2023.

title: Mandiri Tunas Finance issues IDR 1.16 trillion bonds with the highest coupon at 7.25%
body: PT Mandiri Tunas Finance (MTF), a subsidiary of PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) which operates in the financing sector, issued Shelf Registration Bonds VI Phase III 2024, with a principal amount of IDR 1.16 trillion.

title: DIGI and EMOF I agreed on CPD relaxation
body: PT Arkadia Digital Media Tbk (DIGI) obtained relaxation of the Convertible Performance Debenture (CPD) agreement worth IDR 11.56 billion with the Emerging Media Opportunity Fund (EMOF) I, LP, United States.

title: Bank Neo Commerce secured IDR 14.35 trillion in first quarter third party funds
body: PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) collected IDR 14.35 trillion in Third Party Funds (DPK) and net credit distribution of IDR 8.86 trillion throughout the first quarter of 2024. The current account and savings accounts (CASA) ratio is approximately 27.60% of the total DPK.

title: Ayam Goreng Nelongso’s net profit soared 52.53% in Q1 2024
body: PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk (BAIK), the managing company of Ayam Goreng Nelongso franchise network, scored net profit of IDR 3.92 billion in Q1 2024, up 52.53% year-on-year (yoy) from the same quarter last year.

title: Harita Nickel to prepare IDR 400 billion for buyback
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL), a nickel mining company popularly known as Harita Nickel, will execute the shares buyback with a budget of IDR 400 billion.

title: Bank Syariah Indonesia to distribute dividend of IDR 855.56 billion
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), a sharia bank owned by several national banks, announced its cash dividend distribution of IDR 855.56 billion or IDR 18.55 per share.

title: ISAT readies dividend distribution of IDR 2.2 trillion
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) of PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT) agreed upon the allocation of dividend of IDR 2.17 trillion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023, slightly climbing from IDR 2.06 trillion allocated in FY 2022.

title: BREN continues to soar, market cap reaches IDR 1.49 quadrillion
body: The stock of PT Barito Energy Resources Tbk (BREN) solidly moves forward by 12.91% until Tuesday (21/5), starting from May 2, 2024.

title: Trisula Textile Industries’ profit soared 62% earlier this year
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), a textile and finished fashion product provider, recorded net profit of IDR 6.6 billion in Q1 2024

title: Tempo to focus on data presentation transformation
body: The transformation of news and data presentation will be the new focus of Tempo for the future, thus driving Tempo to continue developing various video and podcast contents to present news in more attractive and accessible fashion.

title: Waskita’s bondholders’ meeting regarding IDR 1.36 trillion bond fell through
body: The General Meeting of Bondholders (GMB) of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), which supposedly took place on May 16, 2024, failed to meet the requirements.

title: BAUT to set up dividend of IDR 1.02 trillion
body: PT Mitra Angkasa Sejahtera Tbk (BAUT) sets aside 20% of net profit in 2023 as dividend. This allocation is similar to the allocation made in the fiscal year (FY) 2022.

title: OJK closes down 915 illegal financial institutions until April 2024
body: The Financial Services Authority (OJK), through Task Force of Eradication of Illegal Finance Activities (Satgas Pasti), closed down 915 illegal financial institutions from January 1 until April 30, 2024.

title: MPXL secures new contracts of IDR 148.39 billion
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL) secured bulk cement sale and purchase contracts with PT Victory Utama Beton (VUB) worth IDR 148.39 billion yesterday (20/5).

title: NICE secures 63.24% surge since early 2024
body: The stock of PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) increased 63.24%, starting from its debut on the stock exchange earlier this year until last Monday (20/5).

title: DYAN eyes 10% revenue growth in 2024
body: Although the net profit shifted 32.4% year-on-year (yoy) down in Q1 2024, PT Dyandra Media International Tbk (DYAN) booked meagre growth in Q1 2024 revenue, up 3.5% yoy to IDR 383.4 billion.

title: RALS’s dividend shrinks 3.67% to IDR 296.56 billion
body: The dividend of PT Ramayan Lestari Sentosa Tbk (RALS) for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 slid down 3.67% from the FY 2022 dividend.

title: Net profit of Bali United owner declines 99.95% in the first quarter
body: PT Bali Bintang Sejahtera Tbk (BOLA), the issuer that manages the Bali United and Putra Samarinda football clubs, only posted a net profit of IDR 16.59 million in the first quarter (Q1) 2024, down 99.95% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same quarter last year.

title: Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa to distribute final dividend of IDR 17.6 billion
body: PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa Tbk (KMDS) will share final dividend of IDR 17.6 billion or IDR 22 per share, taken out of its net profit in 2023.

title: Provident Investasi Bersama prepares IDR 80.61 billion for buyback
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM), a holding of investment companies under Provident Capital and Saratoga Group, will hold a buyback with a budget of IDR 80.61 billion.

title: Profit dropped 91%, HALO’s foreign investors decide on mass-divest
body: The decline of net profit of PT Haloni Jane Tbk (HALO) that reached 91% year-on-year (yoy) leads to gradual mass-divestment by foreign investors within the past three months.

title: Incoming bids in today’s state sukuk auction hit IDR 16.5 trillion
body: The total incoming bids recorded within the auction of Government Sharia Securities (lit. Surat Berharga Syariah Negara/SBSN) or state sukuk today (20/5) were recorded at IDR 16.5 trillion.

title: META’s controlling shareholder to extend tender offer to June 19
body: Controlling shareholder of PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META) under Salim Group, PT Metro Pacific Tollways Indonesia (MPTIS), is extending the voluntary tender offer period, starting from today (20/5) until June 19, setting the offering price to IDR 250 per share.

title: BAIK’s shares dropped 71.58% since its debut
body: The stock price of PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk (BAIK) plummeted 71.58% since its debut in the stock exchange until last Friday’s (17/5) session.

title: 3 months in, MKAP saw 273.91% surge in price
body: The stock of PT Multikarya Asia Pasifik Raya Tbk (MKAP) has increased 273.91% to IDR 430 per share from IDR 115 per share seen during its debut on the stock exchange on February 12, 2024.

title: BIKE to distribute dividend of IDR 12.93 billion
body: After a year in the stock market, PT Sepeda Bersama Indonesia Tbk (BIKE) has decided to set up dividend of the fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 12.93 billion.

title: Stock price still high, DSSA to stock split with 1:10 ratio
body: PT Dian Swastika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA) is planning a stock split with a ratio of 1:10, from IDR 250 per share to IDR 25 per share.

title: MIDI to allocate 30% of net profit as dividend
body: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI), the managing company of Alfamidi convenience store network, sets aside 30% of its 2023 net profit as dividend, stable compared to 2022 net profit.

title: Tigaraksa Satria to channel final dividend of IDR 286.57 million
body: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk (TGKA), a consumer good wholesale and distribution company, will issue final dividend of IDR 286.57 billion or IDR 312 per share, which will be taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: Up 19%, MASA sets up dividend of IDR 339.67 billion
body: PT Multistrada Arah Sarana Tbk (MASA) will share cash dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 339.67 billion, up 19.34% from FY 2022 dividend of IDR 284.67 billion.

title: Champ Resto Indonesia’s net profit multiply 4 times in Q1 2024
body: PT Champ Resto Indonesia Tbk (ENAK), a food & beverage (F&B) company debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in February 2022, booked net profit of IDR 15.46 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Apexindo Pratama Duta saw 73.53% surge in net profit Q1 2024
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX), an oil and gas drilling service company operating since 1984, reported net profit of USD 1.77 million in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Sumber Alfaria Trijaya to share cash dividend of IDR 1.19 trillion
body: PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT) will schedule cash dividend distribution of IDR 1.19 trillion or IDR 28.68 per share taken out of its net profit in 2023.

title: Foreign buy and sell remains stable at 4 billion shares; net foreign recorded -93.37 million shares
body: Foreign buy and sell volumes on Friday, May 17, were both in the range of 4 billion shares, with foreign buying volume at 4.37 billion shares and foreign selling volume at 4.46 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended slightly in the red, at -93.37 million shares. The top stock on the top buy list belongs to the telecommunications company PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN), which was purchased for 85.36 million shares at a net volume of 52.06 million. On the top-selling list, shares of the e-commerce company PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA) were at the top, with a sales volume of 238.59 million shares and a net volume of -188.67 million shares.

title: Samuel Tumbuh Bersama acquires 1.71 billion shares of Nusantara Sawit (NSSS)
body: On Wednesday, May 15, a new investor, PT Samuel Tumbuh Bersama, purchased 1.71 shares of palm oil producer PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS). This securities company now owns roughly 7.19% of NSSS shares. On the other hand, NSSS's controller, PT Mitra Agro Dharma Unggul, released 1.10 billion shares, causing its share portion to fall from 41.79% to 37.17%.

title: Foreign buy reaches 3.67 billion shares: net foreign volume closes with 174.58 million surplus
body: On Thursday, May 16, foreign investors purchased shares and recorded a foreign buying volume of up to 3.67 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was 3.50 billion shares, with the net foreign volume surplus at approximately 174.58 million shares. The media business PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk (MNCN) had the most shares purchased, with 218.01 million and a net volume of 50.38 million. Apart from that, 77.55 million shares of the advertising and management consultancy company PT Era Media Sejahtera Tbk (DOOH) were purchased, resulting in the highest net volume of 56.76 million shares.

title: Liliawati Rahardjo acquires 5.09% ownership of Summarecon Agung (SMRA)
body: Individual investor Liliawati Rahardjo acquired 5.09% of property developer PT Summarecon Agung Tbk (SMRA) on Tuesday, May 14. This new investor obtained her stake by purchasing 840.71 million SMRA shares from PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia and PT Indo Premier Sekuritas.

title: 762 million Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares bought, net foreign volume recorded surplus of 221.67 million shares
body: Foreign investors purchased 762.11 million shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Wednesday, May 15, for a net volume of 241.53 million. This transaction boosted foreign buy volume to 2.69 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales totaled 2.47 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 221.67 million shares.

title: Two major investors in Triputra Agro (TAPG) released billions of shares
body: News from PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG), a palm oil and rubber company, drove the stock market on Monday, May 13. Two TAPG foreign investors sold a large number of shares, beginning with Gochean Holdings Incorporated, which sold 1.09 billion shares, increasing its shareholding to 5.39%. Then, Salween Investment Pte Ltd. sold 1.49 billion shares, reducing its ownership to just 7.37%. Even so, PT Persada Capital Investama, the holder of 23% of TAPG shares, increased its shareholding by 999.86 million shares, bringing its ownership to 28.28%.

title: Lawson Indonesia to gain extra capital of IDR 70 billion
body: PT Lancar Wiguna Sejahtera (LWS), a subsidiary of PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI) that operates Lawson in Indonesia, receives another extra capital of IDR 70 billion.

title: Mark Dynamics to distribute final dividend of IDR 114 billion
body: PT Mark Dynamics Indonesia Tbk (MARK), a glove cast and sanitation product manufacturer, will distribute final dividend of IDR 114 billion or IDR 30 per share.

title: OPPM to issue bonds worth over IDR 4 trillion
body: PT Oki Pulp & Paper Mills (OPPM) will issue bonds worth more than IDR 4 trillion, consisting of conventional bond, global bond, and green bond.

title: Higher finance expenses, Kobexindo Tractors lost IDR 41.91 billion
body: PT Kobexindo Tractors Tbk (KOBX), a distributor of heavy equipment and vehicles, reported a loss of IDR 41.91 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Adaro Energy Indonesia to channel final dividend of USD 400 million
body: PT Adaro Energi Indonesia Tbk (ADRO), one of the biggest coal mining companies in Indonesia, will be preparing the final dividend distribution of USD 400 million or IDR 6.4 trillion.

title: Up 6.46%, ELSA to channel dividend of IDR 201.25 billion
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA) will distribute dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 201.25 billion, up 6.46% year-on-year (yoy) from the dividend allocated in FY 2022.

title: Indosat’s net profit grew 39.3% in Q1 2024
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT), a wireless telecommunication service company with the highest market cap in Indonesia, scored net profit of IDR 1.29 trillion in Q1 2024, growing 39.3% year-on-year (yoy) from the same quarter last year.

title: PBID officially sets up stock split with 1:4 ratio
body: PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk (PBID) will split its stock with a ratio of 1:4, meaning that one old share will be split into 4 new shares with a new face value.

title: Waskita Karya bailed on bond’s principal and interest payment of IDR 1.36 trillion
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), yet again, failed to pay off principal and interest of its bond worth IDR 1.36 trillion, whose payment is due this Thursday (16/5).

title: Delta Djakarta readies dividend of IDR 281 per share
body: PT Delta Djakarta Tbk (DLTA), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, decided to pay out dividend of IDR 281 per share for the fiscal year 2023, down 15.7% from the dividend allocation in 2022, following the net profit decline in 2023.

title: Selling expenses swelled, Bakrie & Brothers’ profit down 24%
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR), a multisector holding company of Bakrie Group, only managed to book net profit of IDR 53.02 billion in Q1 2024.

title: Prima Cakrawala takes over 4.44 billion shares of Bank MNC from MNC Land
body: On Wednesday, May 8, up to 4.45 billion shares of PT Bank MNC Internasional Tbk (BABP) exchanged hands. A new investor, PT Prima Cakrawala Sentosa, acquired these shares from PT MNC Land Tbk's stake, resulting in its falling from 16.82% to 6.82%, with Prima Cakrawala now holding 10%. PT MNC Sekuritas facilitated the transaction between these two investors.

title: TOTL to pay dividend of IDR 136.4 billion, down 60%
body: PT Total Bangun Persada Tbk (TOTL) will be distributing dividend of IDR 136.4 billion for the fiscal year (FY) 2023, down 60% from FY 2022 of IDR 341 billion.

title: Saratoga's dividend only IDR 22 per share, buyback got cancelled
body: PT Saratoga Investama Sedaya Tbk (SRTG), the investment company founded by Erwin Soeryadjaya and Sandiaga Uno, announced the dividend distribution of IDR 22 per share.

title: EPMT to share dividend of IDR 449.63 billion
body: PT Enseval Putera Megatrading Tbk (EPMT) distributes dividend for fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 449.63 billion, which is lower than FY 2022 dividend of IDR 555.27 billion.

title: XL & Smartfren announce merger, foreign investors seen selling shares
body: Telecommunication companies, PT XL Axiata Tbk. (EXCL) and PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk. (FREN) have signed a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding following the planned merger of the two telecommunications companies.

title: MIDI posted IDR 158.56 billion in Q1 profit
body: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI), which manages the Alfamidi network, posted a net profit of IDR 158.56 billion in the first quarter of 2024, up 34.94% from the same period in 2023 of IDR 117.50 billion.

title: Indika Energy issues IDR 5.64 trillion bonds
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk. (INDY) issued bonds worth US$350 million or around IDR 5.64 trillion (Jidor exchange rate IDR 16,131/dollar) with interest of 8.75% per year, marking the first high yield in Indonesia and Asean in 2024.

title: Foreign purchase and sell volumes differ slightly; net foreign volume at -118.10 million shares
body: On Tuesday, May 14, share purchasing and selling activities were found to be quite similar, with a foreign buying volume of 2.51 billion shares and a selling volume of 2.63 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -118.10 million shares. The energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) had the biggest net volume this time, with around 81.11 million shares, following the purchase of 87.61 million of its shares by foreign investors.

title: MBMA plans for a 10% rights issue
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk. (MBMA) will conduct a rights issue of up to 10% of total issued and fully paid up by the Company. Approval for this corporate action plan will be sought at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) on June 21, 2024.

title: Sale of 504 million Smartfren Telecom (FREN) shares drives net foreign volume to -108.77 million
body: On Monday, May 13, foreign investors were selling 504.19 million shares of the telecommunications company PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) for a net volume of -448.64 million shares. This sale contributed to an increase in foreign sell volume to around 3.60 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was only 3.49 billion shares, resulting in a deficit net foreign volume of -108.77 million shares.

title: Now official, TPIA to spin off port business
body: Shareholders of PT Chandra Asri Pasific Tbk (TPIA) approved the plan to spin-off its port, dock, and storage facilities business line managed by PT Chandra Pelabuhan Nusantara (CPAT).

title: Vale Indonesia is granted 10-year operational license extension
body: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) has received an extension of operational license from Indonesian government, following the issuance of Special Mining Business License on May 13, 2024.

title: SIDO to allocate 95.56% of net profit as dividend
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) sets aside 96.56% of its net profit in 2023 as cash dividend, lower than the allocation made for the fiscal year (FY) 2022 of 99.18%.

title: WOM Finance’s net profit slightly climbed 0.24% in Q1 2024
body: PT Wahana Ottomitra Multiartha Tbk (WOMF), widely known as WOM Finance, reported a shy climb of 0.24% year-on-year (yoy) in its net profit in Q1 2024 to IDR 62.81 billion.

title: Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa to distribute cash dividend of IDR 308.79 billion
body: PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa Tbk (INTP), a cement manufacturer with the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 308.79 billion or IDR 90 per share.

title: KJEN jumped to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Krida Jaringan Nusantara Tbk (KJEN) soared 34.43% until the end of trading session yesterday (15/5), which placed this issuer at the top of the gainer’s list.

title: Legrand Indonesia holds Data Centre Summit 2024
body: Legrand Indonesia, collaborating with Indonesia Data Center Provider Organization (IDPRO), held the second edition of Legrand Day 2024 – Data Center Summit last Tuesday (14/5), featuring experts, authorities, and business players in the data centre industry.

title: MSCI Global Small Cap Index reevaluated, 9 Indonesian issuers were dropped
body: Five issuers listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) are now entering as constituents of MSCI Global Small Cap Indexes, replacing 9 other companies from said index.

title: PP Presisi booked loss of IDR 31.28 billion in Q1 2024
body: PT PP Presisi Tbk (PPRE), a subsidiary of PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) engaged in the building construction, suffered a loss of IDR 31.28 billion in the first quarter of 2024.

title: Bank OCBC NISP’s profit climbed 13.4% in Q1 2024
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) booked net profit of IDR 1.16 trillion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, growing 13.4% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same quarter last year.

title: Dharma Polimetal exports automotive components to the United States
body: PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk (DRMA), an automotive component manufacturer which is part of the Triputra Group, has made its first export of automotive component products to the United States.

title: OK Bank eyes profit of IDR 30.04 billion in 2024
body: PT Bank Oke Indonesia Tbk (DNAR) is optimistic about attaining net profit of IDR 30.04 billion at the end of this year despite its profit declining in Q1 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Up 60%, PBID sets up dividend of IDR 300 billion
body: The cash dividend of PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk (PBID) soared 60% in the fiscal year (FY) 2023 to IDR 300 billion from 2022 cash dividend of IDR 187.5 billion.

title: Sumber Alfaria Trijaya to establish new digital business line, Alfagift
body: PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT), the managing company of Alfamart and Alfamidi convenience stores, will establish a new business line in the digital platform sector called Alfagift.

title: Oki Pulp & Paper Mills to issue 3 bonds worth nearly IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Oki Pulp & Paper Mills (OPPM), a subsidiary under PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk (TKIM) of Sinarmas Group, will issue another bond in rupiah and US dollar.

title: Gov’t aims for IDR 10 trillion in next week’s sukuk auction
body: Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk next Monday (20/5), with an indicative target of IDR 10 trillion.

title: CHEM soared to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Chemstar Indonesia Tbk (CHEM) soared 35% until the closing bell today (14/5). It then arrives at the top of the gainers’ list in the stock market.

title: NRCA to allocate dividend of IDR 29 per share
body: Shareholders of PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk (NRCA) have agreed upon the dividend allocation for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 of IDR 70.1 billion, or equal to IDR 29 per share, on the AGMS held today (14/5).

title: NRCA to aim Patimban Toll to begin late 2024
body: PT Nusa Raya Cipta Tbk (NRCA) is targeting the construction of Patimban Access Toll Road in Subang, West Java, to be able to take place later this year.

title: In need of capital for 2 toll roads, CMNP to hold rights issue
body: PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk (CMNP) to schedule a rights issue to raise the capital for developing Ir Wiyoto-Wiyono Toll Road, as well as the construction of Section 3-4 of Depok-Antasari Toll Road.

title: Boosted by revenue, RAFI’s net profit grew 64.55% in Q1 2024
body: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI), a food ingredient supplier and the managing company of Kebab Turki Baba Rafi franchise, booked net profit of IDR 5.55 billion in Q1 2024, up 64.55% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Honoris Corporindo purchased 2.31 billion Modernland Realty (MDLN) shares and now owns 25%
body: On Tuesday, May 7, PT Honoris Corporindo Pratama bought 2.31 billion shares of PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN), a property developer. PT Panin Sekuritas oversaw the transaction, drastically increasing Honoris Corporindo's ownership from 7.07% to 25.55%.

title: Vehicle sales decline continues to April 2024
body: Motor vehicle sales as of April 2024 dropped 34.91% from March 2024, in which vehicles of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) still dominate the biggest market share in Indonesia.

title: MAHA to pay dividend of IDR 199.9 billion
body: PT Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Tbk (MAHA) allocates 75.13% of net profit attributable to the parent company as cash dividend in the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: Marco Moniaga owns 6.16% of Wahana Inti Makmur (NASI) after purchasing nearly 50 million shares
body: On Monday, May 6, new individual investor Marco Moniaga bought 49.72 million shares of PT Wahana Inti Makmur Tbk (NASI), a rice producer and supplier. This purchase was made through PT Mirae Asset Sekuritas Indonesia, giving Marco 6.16% of the shares immediately. Aside from that, controlling investor PT Hillcon Equity Management purchased 50 million shares of nickel mining contractor PT Hillcon Tbk (HILL).

title: LPIN’s profit shrinks, dividend increases
body: PT Multi Prima Sejahtera Tbk (LPIN) sets aside 56.02% of total net profit attributable to the parent company as cash dividend for the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: Lautan Luas’s net profit grew 72.5% in Q1
body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS), an importer and distributor of chemicals for garment and good industry, booked net profit of IDR 87.53 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Aneka Tambang to share its entire 2023 net profit as cash dividend
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM), a state-owned gold mining company under MIND ID, will distribute the entirety of its net profit in 2023 as cash dividend.

title: Energi Mega Persada grants subsidiary a loan of USD 22.8 million
body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG) has channelled a loan facility to one of its subsidiaries, PT Pema Global Energi (PGE), worth a total of USD 22.8 million.

title: Opening the week, LABA is the new top gainer
body: The stock price of PT Ladangbaja Murni Tbk (LABA) soared 31.39% this Monday (13/5) after a long holiday last week. This shift leads the company to the top of the gainers’ list in the stock market.

title: Summarecon to issue Bond of IDR 1.3 trillion
body: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk (SMRA) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase III Year 2024 worth ID 1.3 trillion t the end of May 2024.

title: Jasa Marga to distribute IDR 274.8 billion of cash dividend
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR), a state-owned enterprise (SOE) engaged in the operation of several toll roads, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 274.8 billion that is taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: TEBE to set up cash dividend of IDR 64.25 billion, down 45.05%
body: PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk (TEBE) distributed cash dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 64.25 billion, 45.05% lower than the dividend in the fiscal year 2022 of IDR 116.93 billion.

title: Entering new market, Mustika Ratu to partner with Japan’s Sugi Holdings
body: PT Mustika Ratu Tbk (MRAT) has agreed upon a cooperation with Sugi Holdings Co. Ltd., a public company listed on Tokyo Stock Exchange (TYO), for its business development.

title: Theta Capital to set up tender offer of two bonds
body: Theta Capital Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk (LPKR), will issue a tender offer for two sets of bonds maturing in 2025 and 2026.

title: SMGR’s profit down 16% in Q1 2024
body: Throughout the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, net profit attributable to the parent entity of PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) decreased 16% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 471.81 billion from IDR 561.61 billion seen in the same period in 2023.

title: Indonesia’s forex reserves down 3%
body: The foreign exchange (forex) reserves of Indonesia slipped 3% down to USD 136.2 billion in April 2024 from USD 140.4 billion in Mach 2024.

title: Foreign investors buy up to 3.84 billion shares; net foreign recorded surplus 230.20 million
body: On Wednesday, May 8, foreign investors bought up to 3.84 billion shares. They did, however, sell their shareholdings, resulting in a foreign sell volume of 3.61 billion shares. These trades resulted in a net foreign volume surplus of 230.20 million shares. The most shares acquired belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely 1.50 billion shares, with a net volume of 541.04 million shares.

title: Lippo Group transfers 10.4% of Siloan Hospitals to foreign investors
body: PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk (LPKR) has reportedly signed a Conditional Share Sale Agreement with Sight Investment Company Pte. Ltd., for 10.4% of PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO).

title: In need of funding, PTBA’s dividend payout ratio drops to 75%
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA), a coal mining company under state-owned holding of mining companies, MIND ID, decided to only distribute IDR 4.57 trillion of cash dividend this year, or equal to 75% of 2023 net profit.

title: Indo Tambangraya Megah’s net profit slipped 66% down in Q1
body: PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG), a coal mining company under Banpu Minerals (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., only booked net profit growth worth USD 61.6 million in the first quarter of 2024.

title: FLEI promotes franchise and license industry growth
body: The 22nd edition of Franchise & License Expo Indonesia (FLEI) was officially opened at Jakarta International Expo (JIEXPO), Kemayoran, last Friday (10/5).

title: SOLA ranks first in top gainers
body: PT Xola Rcr Energy Tbk (SOLA) shares rose 34.55% until the close of trading Wednesday afternoon (8/5). This achievement pushed this issuer to the top of the Top 10 Gainers in the capital market.

title: TPIA and Glencore to acquire Shell Energy and Chemicals Park Singapore
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA) and Glencore PLC have signed a sale and purchase agreement to acquire the entire portion of Shell Singapore Pte in Shell Energy and Chemicals Park Singapore (SECP).

title: Shima Global sold 90 million shares of Energi Mega Persada (ENRG)
body: PT Shima Global Kapital, the owner of 23.81% of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), reduced its shareholding on Friday, May 3, by selling 90.55 million ENRG shares. Shima Global's ownership of this issuer, which operates in the field of oil and gas exploration and trading, fell slightly to 23.45% due to this sale facilitated by PT KB Valbury Sekuritas.

title: Dana Brata Luhur reveals port upgrade plans
body: In order to face the slump in coal industry that took a toll on its performance, PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk (TEBE) prepares a plan to upgrade the status of its port from special terminal for coals to a Port Business Unit.

title: Weak coal industry, TEBE readies diversification
body: PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk (TEBE) recorded a significant decline in revenue in Q1 2024 by up to 42.3% year-on-year (yoy) due to slowing-down of coal industry.

title: Foreign transactions stabilized, net foreign volume remained negative at 269 million shares
body: On Tuesday, May 7, foreign investors' share buying and selling transactions became stable. Foreign buy volume was approximately 2.60 billion shares, while foreign sell volume was around 2.87 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume concluded at -269.70 million shares. The shares with the largest purchase belonged to the telecommunications company PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN), which were purchased for 105.18 million shares with a net volume of 83.60 million shares. Meanwhile, the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares sold, totaling 901.11 million with a net volume of -187.07 million.

title: As foreign sell volume rises drastically, net foreign volume drops to -884 million shares
body: Foreign investors' share-selling transactions on Monday, May 6, doubled from the previous day, bringing the total foreign sell volume to 8.16 billion shares. However, foreign buy volume was just 7.28 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -884.54 million shares. One of the factors contributing to the high foreign sales volume was the sale of 2.03 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with a net volume of -311.25 million shares.

title: Mega Perintis's net profit slid 6.9% down in Q1
body: PT Mega Perintis Tbk (ZONE), a clothing manufacturer and retail company, booked net profit of IDR 17.08 billion in the first quarter of 2024, down 6.9% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Solid revenue, SCMA's profit skyrocketed 185.8%
body: PT Surya Citra Media Tbk (SCMA), a media company overseeing several television channels and digital platforms, booked net profit of IDR 190.51 billion in the first quarter of 2024.

title: UANG secures IDR 470 billion loan for 2 property projects
body: PT Pakuan Tbk (UANG) secures a loan of a maximum IDR 470 billion from PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) in relation the the development of Shila at Sawangan and Vasanta Ecotown.

title: Adaro Energy Indonesia's subsidiary secures USD 550 million loan from affiliate
body: A subsidiary of PT Adaro Enery Indonesia Tbk (ADRO), PT Alam Tri Abadi (ATA), has reportedly signed a loan agreement with an affiliate, PT Adaro Indonesia (AI).

title: Mitrabara Adiperdana to channel cash dividend of IDR 78.54 billion
body: PT Mitrabara Adiperdana Tbk (MBAP), a coal mining company under Baramulti Group, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 78.54 billion or IDR 64 per share.

title: Total bids in last state sukuk auction reached IDR 15.99 trilion
body: The amount of bids recorded in the auction of Sharia Government Securities (SBSN) last Monday (6/5) was reported at IDR 15.99 trillion.

title: Sales thrive, SUNI secures 30% of this year’s profit target
body: It has only been three months in into 2024, but PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI) has reached 30% of its net profit target for 2024, scoring IDR 33.37 billion until the end of March 2024.

title: PWON’s profit eroded 44.41% in Q1 2024 due to forex losses
body: PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) saw net profit decline in Q1 2024 due to increased general expenses, as well as losses on foreign exchange (forex).

title: Morning session caught JCI solid in green zone
body: Although Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) slipped to the red zone right after gaining strides at today’s (7/5) opening bell, the index managed to pick up the pace and climbed back up at 11 AM WIB.

title: East Ventures to lead the funding of Runchise culinary start-up of USD 1 million
body: Runchise, a start-up in culinary franchise and restaurant management based in Indonesia, has secured a funding worth USD 1 million, led by East Ventures.

title: UBS AG Singapore invests in BISI International (BISI) and now controls 5.27%
body: On Thursday, May 2, a foreign investor named UBS AG Singapore Non-Treaty Omnibus Account - 2091144090 made a new investment in PT BISI International Tbk (BISI). The investor acquired 157.95 million shares of this agricultural issuer, giving it an immediate share ownership of 5.27%. The same investor was also observed purchasing 5.60 million additional shares in the agricultural firm PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk (CPIN), resulting in a rise in the share percentage from 5.95 to 5.98%.

title: Dividend 65.44% lower, SMGR allocates IDR 572.04 billion this year
body: The dividend of PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) for the fiscal year (FY) 2023 is 65.44% lower than the dividend for FY 2022, due to the decrease in its net profit attributable to the parent entity.

title: Bayan Resources’ net profit plummeted 49.7% this Q1
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), a coal mining company of Low Tuck Kwong, reported net profit of USD 210.64 million throughout the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: MDKA to hold another private placement, this time with 10% new shares
body: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), a gold mining company debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2015, will issue additional shares without pre-emptive rights, also known as private placement.

title: Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya to distribute cash dividend of IDR 331.92 billion
body: PT Garuda Food Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD), a processed food manufacturer established in 1979, will issue cash dividend distribution of IDR 331.92 billion, or IDR 9 per share, from its net profit in the fiscal year (FY) 2023.

title: Up to 2.87 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares purchased; net foreign volume recorded at 537.80 million
body: On Friday, May 3, foreign investors purchased 2.87 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 783.74 million shares. This deal raised foreign buying volume to 4.65 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was around 4.11 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of 537.80 million shares in the surplus.

title: Wheat prices soared, TRGU’s profit dropped 90%
body: PT Cerestar Indonesia Tbk (TRGU) recorded 50% year-on-year (yoy) surge in its revenue to IDR 1.8 trillion at the end of Q1 2024.

title: Property sales decline, INPP faces revenue stagnation
body: PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) reported stagnation in its revenue in the first quarter of 2024, reaching IDR 262.6 trillion at the end of March 2024.

title: Operational cost slimmed down, Avrist’s profit up 18.25% in 2023
body: PT Avrist Assurance, an insurance company widely known as Avrist, reported net profit soaring 18.25% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 145 billion last year.

title: Indospring to set up stock split next month with 1:10 ratio
body: PT Indospring Tbk (INDS), a company engaged in automotive component sector, will initiate a stock split with a ratio of 1:10 on July 4, 2024.

title: Venteny is sported with 39.6% profit growth in Q1 2024
body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY), a technology company that provides digital solutions for MSME and corporations, managed to collect net profit of IDR 2.98 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, or growing 39.6% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Low demand, Sepatu Bata closes down 30-year-old Purwakarta factory
body: PT Sepatu Bata Tbk (BATA), a shoe and footwear manufacturer under the brand Bata, has terminated operational activities of its factory in Purwakarta that has been operating since 1994.

title: Turning the table around, Intikeramik Alamasri Industri scored IDR 1.28 billion of profit
body: PT Intikeramik Alamasri Industri Tbk (IKAI) recorded net profit of IDR 1.28 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, turning the tide from the loss it faced in Q1 2023 of IDR 8.95 billion.

title: March-April 2024, BREN’s market cap shifted 71.62%
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) has failed to guard its number-one spot in the Top 10 Market Capitalisation of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in April 2024.

title: Receiving aid from gov’t, WIKA’s rating up to idBBB-
body: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo), local rating agency, has increased the rating of PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) to “idBBB-“ with a stable prospect, from the previous “idSD.”

title: Telkom insists on GoTo investment despite IDR 400 M loss
body: Starting to invest in PT GoTo Gojek Topedia Tbk (GOTO) since May 2023, PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk (TLKM) recorded loss of IDR 403 billion as of Q1 2024.

title: Telkom to channel IDR 17.58 trillion of dividend in June
body: PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk (TLKM), an issuer and State-owned Enterprise (SOE) engaged in the telecommunication sector, is allocating jumbo dividend of IDR 17.58 trillion for the fiscal year 2023.

title: Woori Bank invests another 6.11 billion shares in Bank Woori Saudara (SDRA)
body: On Tuesday, April 30, the controller of PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA), Woori Bank of South Korea, strengthened its control by investing an additional 6.11 billion shares. This transaction, which involved PT Kiwoom Sekuritas Indonesia, increased Woori Bank's shareholding from 84.2% to 90.78%. Two of the investors in PT Metropolitan Land Tbk (MTLA), a development company, also traded some of its shares. PT Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk released 48.89 million MTLA shares, which individual investor, Magnus Jaya, quickly took over.

title: Solid healthcare ecosystem, Bundamedik scored 9.25% profit growth in Q1
body: PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS), the managing company of Bundar Hospital network and several diagnostic laboratories, booked net profit of IDR 10.87 billion in the first quarter of 2024.

title: Foreign transactions recorded at 3.5 billion shares, resulting in -15.51 million shares in net foreign
body: On Thursday, May 2, foreign investors were seen carrying out stock buying and selling activities of similar quantities. This can be seen by the foreign buying volume of 3.52 billion shares and the foreign selling volume of 3.54 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -15.51 million shares. Then, like the previous day, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the most purchased, totaling 1.11 billion shares and a net volume of 557.18 million shares.

title: MFMI dividend declines 17.17%
body: The total dividends for the fiscal year 2023 distributed by PT Multifiling Mitra Indonesia Tbk (MFMI) decreased by 17.17% compared to the dividends for the fiscal year 2022. The decline in dividends is in contrast to the realization of increased revenue and profit.

title: Sekar Laut distributes IDR 31 billion dividends
body: Shareholders of PT Sekar Laut Tbk (SKLT) agreed to allocate a total dividend for the 2023 fiscal year of IDR 31.11 billion, higher than the same period in 2022 of IDR 16.78 billion.

title: Xolare RCR Energy set IPO price to the highest, IDR 110 per share
body: PT Xolare RCR Energy Tbk (SOLA), an asphalt manufacturer and construction service provider, has set the IPO price to IDR 110 per share, right at the highest range set during the book building phase.

title: ASSA’s net profit grew 37% in Q1 2024, setting up capex of IDR 1.5 trillion
body: PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA), a logistics company, scored net profit of IDR 71 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, up 37% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same period last year.

title: BREN saw decline in Q1, yet stock soared
body: The performance of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) declined in Q1 2024 from the performance in Q1 2023.

title: Finance expenses swelled, INOV lost IDR 18.16 billion in Q1 2024
body: PT Innocycle Technology Group Tbk (INOV), a plastic waste management company and recycled staple fibre manufacturer, reported loss of IDR 18.16 billion in Q1 2024.

title: CLEO booked 92.5% profit growth in Q1 2024
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO), a bottled mineral water manufacturer under Tanobel Group, managed to score consolidated net profit of IDR 115.3 billion in the first quarter of 2024.

title: AKRA dividend soars 66.6%
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) distributed dividends for the fiscal year 2023, 66.6% higher than the same period last year. This is in line with the 15.68% growth in attributable net profit last year.

title: AMAG to distribute IDR148.6 billion cash dividend from retained earnings
body: PT Asuransi Multi Artha Guna Tbk (AMAG), an insurance company under Fairfax Asia Limited, will distribute cash dividends of IDR148.6 billion or IDR30 per share.

title: Foreigners acquired large number of Gojek Tokopedia shares; net foreign closed at 827 million shares
body: On Tuesday, April 30, foreign investors purchased up to 1.56 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 357.31 million shares. This share purchase transaction became one of the factors driving the increase in foreign purchase volume, which now stands at 4.66 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was in the range of 3.84 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at 827.08 million shares.

title: CGS-CIMB Securities sells 230 million Indonesian Paradise (INPP) shares
body: Foreign investor CGS-CIMB Securities (Singapore) Pte Ltd sold 230 million shares of PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) on Monday, April 29. Through this transaction, which was led by PT CGS International Sekuritas Indonesia, the investor's share portion fell from 10.49% to 8.43%. Indonesian Paradise itself is an issuer that provides accommodation services. Aside from that, PT Aladin Global Ventures released approximately 18.62 million shares of the banking company PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk.

title: Bank Permata’s net profit grew 6.8% in Q1 2024
body: PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) recorded net profit of IDR 807.3 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, up 6.8% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same quarter last year.

title: Eyeing 2T sales, Segar Kumala Indonesia to budget capex of IDR 16 billion
body: After scoring fantastic revenue growth of up to 28.7% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023 to IDR 1.78 triliun, PT Segar Kumala Indonesia Tbk (BUAH), a fruit and frozen poultry wholesale company, aims to obtain sales of IDR 2 trillion, or growing 12.3% yoy until December this year.

title: Profit soared 45.7%, BUAH sets up dividend of IDR 23 billion
body: PT Segar Kumala Indonesia Tbk (BUAH) has allocated 59% of 2023 net profit as cash dividend, equal to IDR 23 billion in total.

title: Pertamina Geothermal Energy maintains impressive profitability in Q1 2024
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO), a renewable energy company under PT Pertamina (Persero), scored net profit of USD 47.49 million in the first quarter of 2024, up 1.17% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same quarter last year.

title: Sales stagnated, INDF’s profit down 36.37%
body: Although sales of PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk (INDF) remain stable in Q1 2024, the management has yet succeeded in maintaining profit stability compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Petrosea to share cash dividend of USD 3.05 million
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO), an oil and gas company recently acquired by Prajogo Pangestu, will distribute cash dividend of USD 3.05 million taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: On track, Bank OCBC NISP now owns Bank Commonwealth
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) has completed the acquisition of PT Bank Commonwealth (PTBC), taking effect from last Wednesday, May 1, 2024.

title: Net foreign volume recorded surplus of 173.28 million shares
body: After being in the red zone consecutively, net foreign volume on Monday, April 29, reported a surplus of 173.28 million shares. This figure reflected a larger foreign buying volume of 3.40 billion shares versus a foreign selling volume of approximately 3.22 billion shares. The list of share purchase transactions then begins with the acquisition of 139.68 million shares of PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) in the coal mining industry for a net volume of 67.05 million shares.

title: Revenue soared 12.3%, MTDL’s profit stagnated
body: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL), a company engaged in the information and communication technology (ICT) sector, reported revenue of IDR 5.1 trillion at the end of the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Adding 4.71 billion shares, Rejuve Global's stake in Pyridam Farma skyrocketed to 78%
body: After previously acquiring 44% of the shares in the pharmaceutical company PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA), the acquisition of Rejuve Global Investment Pte Ltd. continued. On Friday, April 26, this foreign investor added 4.71 billion PYFA shares, increasing its stake from 44.04% to 78.79%. On the other hand, PT Aldiracita Sekuritas Indonesia sold 332.64 million PYFA shares, reducing its ownership from 8.01% to 5.98%.

title: ASII’s top segments slowed down, Q1 2024 performance slipped
body: The net profit of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) slipped 14% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 7.5 trillion at the end of the first quarter of 2024.

title: ASII readies IDR 17 trillion of dividend this May
body: Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) agreed upon the allocation of final dividend of IDR 21 trillion or IDR 519 per share for the fiscal year 2023, which will be paid on May 30, 2024.

title: ELSA booked net profit of IDR 183 billion in Q1
body: Although the revenue of PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA) was seen declining in Q1 2024 compared to the same period in 2023, its profit skyrocketed 59.41% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Roket Cipta Sentosa becomes Cardig Aero (CASS) controller after purchasing more than 1 billion shares
body: On Thursday, April 25, PT Cardig Aero Services Tbk (CASS) welcomed PT Roket Cipta Sentosa as a new investor and controlling shareholder. Without hesitation, this investor purchased 1.06 billion shares of the holding company that supports airport service, acquiring 51% ownership. This transaction was handled by PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk. In contrast, another CASS investor, SATS Ltd., S/A Cemerlang Pte. Ltd., reduced its ownership. This investor sold approximately 205.63 million shares, reducing its stake to around 10.15%.

title: Automotive industry struggled, Adira Finance only scored 3% growth in new financing
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) saw 3% year-on-year (yoy) growth in its new financing to IDR 10.9 trillion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024, a moderate growth due to stagnant automotive industry.

title: DSNG secured profit of IDR 229 billion
body: As of Q1 2024, PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG) managed to score IDR 229 billion of net profit, while sales clocked up to IDR 2.23 trillion.

title: TOBA and PLN NP’s subsidiaries to form a JV
body: PT Batam Tirta Surya (BTS) and PT PLN Nusantara Renewables (PLN NR) will form a joint venture engaged in the renewable energy sector.

title: Surpassing BCA, BREN holds the highest market cap title
body: Market capitalisation of PT Barito Renewable Energy Tbk (BREN) has surpassed PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), arriving as the top market capitalisation in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) yesterday (29/4).

title: Ramayana Lestari Sentosa’s net profit multiplied 2.5 times in Q1 2024
body: PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa Tbk (RALS), the managing company of Ramayana and Robinson Department Stores, booked significant growth in its net profit in Q1 2024.

title: Remala Abadi to set IPO price of IDR 188 per share
body: PT Remala Abadi Tbk (DATA), an internet service provider (ISP) and IT consultant company, has set the price for its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 188 per share.

title: Morning session, JCI solid in green zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) at today’s (30/4) morning session picked up the positive trend shown yesterday (29/4).

title: Going strong, Cinema XXI reported over 700% growth in Q1 2024 profit
body: PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA), the managing company of Cinema XXI theatre network, reported fantastic growth in Q1 2024’s net profit, reaching 701.7% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Profit declined, TOBA to abstain from dividend distribution
body: The net profit of PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) dropped 86.32% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023 from the same period in 2022.

title: Increasing stock liquidity, JECC plans a stock split
body: PT Jembo Cable Company Tbk (JECC) will split its stock with a ratio of 1:5 in order to maximise the liquidity of its stock in the market.

title: Ultrajaya’s net profit soared 14% in Q1 2024
body: PT Ultrajaya Milik Industry & Trading Company Tbk (ULTJ), a packaged milk and tea manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 405.09 billion throughout the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Multipolar Technology to distribute IDR 200.62 billion of cash dividend
body: PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (MLPT), a technology company under Lippo Group, will carry out the distribution of cash dividend of IDR 200.62 billion taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: Up 5%, Mitra Adiperkasa booked net profit of IDR 501 billion in Q1 2024
body: PT Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPI), a retail company managing several renowned food and beverages (F&B) and fashion outlets, recorded net profit of IDR 501 billion in Q1 2024.

title: Trisula International to set up cash dividend of IDR 20.26 billion
body: PT Trisula Internasional Tbk (TRIS), a textile and garment manufacturer, will be channelling cash dividend of IDR 20.26 billion or IDR 6.5 per share for the fiscal year 2023.

title: VINS rose to top gainers again
body: PT Victoria Insurance Tbk (VINS) is back to the top of the gainers’ list at today’s (29/4) closing bell, recreating last week’s (23/4) position. It rose 34.54% from the previous closing price at April 26.

title: Good start for this week, JCI saw green until closing bell
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) has been solid since this morning until the closing bell on Monday (29/4). Until 4 PM WIB, the index was seen stable at 7,155.78.

title: Metro Pacific Tollways now owns 95.52% of Nusantara Infrastructure (META), after acquiring 3.69 billion more shares
body: On Wednesday, April 24, investor PT Metro Pacific Tollways Indonesia purchased a substantial number of shares in PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META). PT BCA Sekuritas facilitated the acquisition of approximately 3.69 billion shares of this construction contractor company by this controlling shareholder, resulting in a significant increase in share ownership from 74.65% to 95.52%.

title: Optimistic, TRIS targets 30% profit growth this year
body: After recording a net profit growth of 5.7% year-on-year (yoy) until the end of December 2023, PT Trisula International Tbk (TRIS) is confident in posting an aggressive increase of up to 30% yoy this year.

title: Sumber Garam handed over 582 million Multi Garam Utama (FOLK) shares to Garam Ventura
body: On Tuesday, April 23, roughly 582.06 million shares of PT Multi Garam Utama Tbk (FOLK), a creative and consumer holding company, were handed over. PT Sumber Garam Pratama handed down these shares via PT KGI Sekuritas Indonesia, decreasing its ownership from 46.31% to 31.56%. PT Garam Ventura Indonesia, on the other hand, increased its ownership significantly from 30.73% to 45.47% after acquiring these shares.

title: Mandiri Coal to allocate dividend of USD 151.2 million, down 55.8%
body: Total dividend of PT Prima Andalan Mandiri Tbk (MCOL) shrank 55.82% to USD 151.20 million in 2023 from USD 235.70 million allocated in 2022.

title: Bridging communities with franchise businesses, FLEI 2024 comes this May
body: Had been postponed due to the 2024 Election earlier this year, Franchise and License Expo Indonesia (FLEI) will be held again on May 10-12, 2024, supported by PT Panorama Media, WALI Association, Kadin, Franchise Academy Indonesia, and various ministries.

title: Foreign buy drops; net foreign at -197.93 million shares
body: Net foreign volume remained negative until Friday, April 26, totaling -197.93 million shares. This was driven by fewer share-buy transactions, which resulted in a total foreign buy volume of 2.92 billion shares. Foreign sell volume, on the other hand, was estimated to be 3.12 billion shares. The most shares sold belonged to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), namely 554.68 million shares, with a net volume of -412.37 million shares.

title: TPMA increases dividend allocation by 25% to IDR 196.67 billion
body: The total dividend for the 2023 financial year of PT Trans Power Marine Tbk (TPMA) grew 25% from the same period in the 2022 financial year.

title: Foreign sell reaches nearly 3 billion shares; net foreign volume at -275 million shares
body: Foreign investors were seen selling more shares on Thursday, April 25, bringing the total number sold to nearly 3 billion shares. Meanwhile, the recorded foreign buying volume was only 2.72 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of around -275.24 million. The most shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) with 742.21 million shares with a net volume of 106.88 million shares, while the shares with the highest sales belonged to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), which sold 356.28 million shares with a net volume of -172.17 million shares.

title: United Tractors to pay out IDR 8.24 trillion cash dividend, lower than last year
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR), a mining and heavy equipment trading company owned by Astra Group, distributed cash dividends of IDR 8.24 trillion or IDR 2,270 per share for fiscal year 2023.

title: Capital outflow continues until the 5th week, reaching IDR40.04 trillion
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) noted that the flow of foreign capital out of Indonesia (capital outflow) in the last 5 weeks reached IDR 40.04 trillion, due to the high net sell by foreign investors.

title: DCII prints profit growth in first quarter
body: The attributable profit of PT DCI Indonesia Tbk (DCII) has posted a growth trend in the last two years in the first quarter since 2022. The median profit growth of this issuer in the first quarter of 2022-2024 was around 53%.

title: Defeating BRI, BREN is now runner-up of IDX market cap
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) has pushed aside PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) to the third place of the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) from the initial runner-up spot.

title: WINS scored 1,126% surge in profit in Q1 2024
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS) scored net profit attributable to the parent entity of USD 2.2 million in Q1 2024, skyrocketing as high as 1,126% year-on-year (yoy) from Q1 2023 from USD 180 thousand.

title: Solid sales, Gema Grahasarana’s profit saw 36.4% surge
body: The net profit of PT Gema Grahasarana Tbk (GEMA), an interior contractor company under Vivere Group, reported net profit of IDR 2.16 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Astra Otoparts to channel final dividend of IDR 646.2 billion
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO), a spare part manufacturer under Astra Group, will distribute final dividend of IDR 636.2 billion or IDR 132 per share on May 22, 2024.

title: In need of extra working capital, HRTA to issue Bond of IDR 500 billion
body: In order to boost its working capital in the long run, PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase I Year 2024 worth IDR 500 billion.

title: Indonesian gov’t eyes IDR 23 trillion in next week’s SUN auction
body: Indonesian government will hold another round of auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Tuesday (30/4) with an indicative target of IDR 23 trillion.

title: Jaya Ancol saw 71.05% decline in Q1 2024
body: In Q1 2024, PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk (PJAA) collected net profit of IDR 13.02 billion, down 71.05% year-on-year (yoy) from the same quarter in 2023 of IDR 44.98 billion.

title: Primarajuli to convert debts to ESTI worth USD 15.10 million
body: PT Primarajuli Sukses (PRS), a subsidiary of PT Ever Shine Tex Tbk (ESTI), will convert its debt to equity (debt-to-equity swap) worth USD 15.10 million.

title: Astra Agro Lestari allocates final dividend of IDR 317.57 billion
body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI), the subsidiary of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) engaged in the palm plantation business, decides to channel final dividend of IDR 317.57 billion.

title: CMRY to set up dividend of IDR 714.12 billion
body: PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy Tbk (CMRY) will share cash dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 714.12 billion.

title: Expenses swelled, SILO’s net profit slid down in Q1 2024
body: Although the revenue of PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO) grew in Q1 2024, its profit significantly dropped compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Baba Rafi silently works on a rice factory project in East Java
body: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI), the owner of Kebab Baba Rafi franchise network, has established a new subsidiary that is engaged in the rice milling and wholesale in Madiun, East Java.

title: AKR’s profit eroded in Q1
body: The revenue of PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) slowed down in Q1 2024 compared to the same period last year.

title: HM Sampoerna will channel out cash dividend of IDR 8.06 trillion
body: PT Hanjaya Mandala Sampoerna Tbk (HMSP), a cigarette manufacturer with the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, is scheduling its cash dividend distribution of IDR 8.06 trillion, taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: Link Net to share 57.26 million treasury shares via MESOP
body: PT Link Net Tbk (LINK) will distribute some of its treasury shares for its Management and Employee Stock Option Program (MESOP) this mid-year.

title: NASI ranks first place in top gainers
body: PT Wahana Inti Makmur Tbk (NASI) recorded a 33.33% increase in share price until the close of afternoon trading on Thursday (25/4).

title: Trisula Textile to distribute IDR 2.5 billion cash dividend
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), a clothing manufacturer under the Trisula Corporation Group, will distribute cash dividends of IDR 2.5 billion.

title: Focus on improving asset quality, BFI Finance net profit corrected by 28.9%
body: PT BFI Finance Tbk (BFIN), a consumer finance company with the largest market capitalization, posted a net profit of IDR 361.44 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: PANI shifts PTPP position in IDX80
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) has replaced PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) at 63rd in the IDX80 Index. The state-owned company's position slipped to 68th in the index, which consists of 80 issuers.

title: ASRM to distribute dividend of IDR 19 billion
body: Shareholders of PT Asuransi Ramayana Tbk (ASRM) agreed upon the allocation of cash dividend of the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 19.77 billion or IDR 65 per share.

title: Net foreign volume remains in red zone at -285.63 million shares
body: Net foreign volume remained consistent in the red zone on Wednesday, April 24, with -285.63 million shares, unchanged from the previous day. This figure was based on a foreign buying volume of approximately 3.25 billion shares and a foreign selling volume of 3.54 billion shares. Foreign investors purchased the biggest shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling 1.26 billion shares and a net volume of 333.19 million shares.

title: Foreign sell reaches 3.67 billion shares; net foreign volume drops to 400 million
body: On Tuesday, April 23, foreign share sales transactions totaled 3.67 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was just about 3.26 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume dropped to -400.90 million shares in the red zone. The majority of share sales, which total more than 100 million shares, contributed to the significant volume of foreign sales. First, about 162.38 million shares of e-commerce company PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA) were sold, for a net volume of -118.13 million shares.

title: Up 30.04%, SIDO to score IDR 1.05 trillion in Q1 2024
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) reported growth throughout Q1 2024 compared to the same quarter of 2023.

title: Jonathan Tahir acquired 200 million shares of Estee Gold Feet and now owns 7.85% of the company
body: PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO) embraced another new investor on Monday, April 22. Jonathan Tahir, an individual investor, purchased 200 million shares through PT Danatama Makmur Sekuritas, acquiring approximately 7.85% of the company's stock.

title: Estee Gold Feet (EURO) welcomed two new investors
body: PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO), a producer of cosmetic aerosols and household appliances, gained two new investors on Friday, April 19. First, PT Bhakti Cahaya Intiperkasa purchased approximately 127.65 million EURO shares, amounting to 5.01% ownership. Aside from that, PT. Bersama Jaya Solusi now owns 7.79% of EURO shares, having purchased 198.44 million shares. In addition, another EURO investor, PT. Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia, purchased 39.20 million shares, increasing its stake from 5.99% to 7.53%. On the other hand, EURO's majority shareholder, PT Timmsyale, reduced its shares by 199 million, reducing its equity stake from 43.51% to 35.7%.

title: WIKA to pay off Sukuk Mudharabah 2020
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) will pay off Series A of Shelf-Registration Sukuk Mudharabah I Phase I Year 2020 worth a total of IDR 190.34 billion.

title: These six companies are out of IDX80
body: Six issuers got kicked out from IDX80 after a major evaluation conducted by Indonesia Stock Exchange yesterday (24/4).

title: IDX welcoming 2 new LQ45 members
body: Two issuers have recently entered LQ45 index for the period of May 2 to July 31, 2024, after major evaluation by Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) yesterday (24/4).

title: Unilever Indonesia’s net profit grew 3.06% in Q1 2024
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR), a Fast-Moving Consumer Good (FMCG) company with the highest market capitalisation, booked net profit of IDR 1.44 trillion in Q1 2024.

title: Batavia Prosperindo Internasional plans a stock split with 1:20 ratio
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII), a business and management consultancy service provider, will issue a stock split with a ratio set to 1:20.

title: Solid sales figure, Mark Dynamics’ net profit skyrocketed 136.8%
body: PT Mark Dynamics Tbk (MARK), a glove cast and sanitation product manufacturer, recorded net profit of IDR 72.73 billion in Q1 2024.

title: PTIS arrived at top gainers
body: Positive trend seen in Jakarta Composite Index today (24/4) generated a fruitful result for PT Indo Straits Tbk (PTIS) throughout Tuesday (24/4).

title: Mooryati Soedibyo, Mustika Ratu founder, passed on at 96
body: Mooryati Soedibyo, the founder of the renowned body care product company in Indonesia, PT Mustika Ratu Tbk (MRAT), has reportedly passed away at 96 years old.

body: PT Boga Mulia Raya Tbk (KEJU), the manufacturer of cheese under the brand Prochiz, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 53 per share or IDR 79.5 billion in total.
