body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS) bagged profit of IDR 5.70 trillion in 2023, 33.88% year-on-year (yoy) higher from 2022 profit of IDR 4.26 trillion.

title: DSNG to raise portion in REA Kaltim
body: PT Agro Pratama (AP), a subsidiary of PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG), has increased its portion by 20% to 35% in PT REA Kaltim Plantations.

title: Financial expenses swelled, MAHA saw 46.58% decline in profit
body: The profit of PT Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Tbk (MAHA) shrank 46.58% year-on-year (yoy) due to increased financial expenses and unrealised loss of stock investment, despite its revenue soaring 20.45% yoy in 2023.

title: SHIP’s subsidiary to secure facility of USD 32.85 million from Bank Mandiri
body: PT Golden Benua Maritim (GBM), one of many subsidiaries of PT Sillomaritime Perdana Tbk (SHIP), has signed a credit facility agreement with PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Trisula Textile Industries to set up buyback, budget of IDR 30 billion
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), will repurchase its shares (buyback) with a budget set to IDR 30 billion.

title: Oversubscribed, TPIA concludes Shelf-Registration Bond IV issuance
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA) has successfully issued Shelf-Registration Bond IV 2024 worth IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Sunday Ins to conclude KSK Insurance acquisition
body: Sunday Ins Holding (Sunday) has officially become the new controlling shareholder of PT KSK Insurance Indonesia.

title: SMGR reported profit of IDR 2.17 trillion, down 8.20%
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) reported revenue surge of 6.24% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023. However, its net profit shrank 8.20% yoy from 2022.

title: PGAS’s net profit slipped 14.7% yoy
body: Despite the revenue surge, PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) reported a decline in its net profit in 2023.

title: Massive expansion pays off, Cinema XXI gains 18.9% revenue surge
body: PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA), the managing company of Cinema XXI theatre network, recorded revenue surge of 18.9% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023 to IDR 5.2 trillion.

title: PPRE to seek 20% growth in new contract
body: PT PP Presisi Tbk (PPRE) aims to score new contracts’ growth of 20% until the end of this year.

title: Panca Budi Idaman’s net profit grew 6% amidst declining sales
body: PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk (PBID), a plastic packaging manufacturer and distributor, booked net profit of IDR 374.15 billion in 2023, up 6% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Continue to slipping this year, ASII at the bottom of top 10 market cap
body: The market capitalisation of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) arrived at the bottom level of the top 10 market cap in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) as of February 2024.

title: Apexindo Pratama to convert bonds worth IDR 1.63 trillion to shares
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX), an oil-and-gas and coal mining supporting service provider, will issue a capital increase without pre-emptive rights.

title: Foreign buy volume is higher, with a net foreign surplus of 455.10 million shares
body: On Friday, March 8, foreign investors purchased shares, totaling 2.54 billion shares. With a foreign sales volume of around 2.09 billion shares, net foreign volume ended up with a surplus of 455.10 million shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares purchased, totaling 804.30 million with a net volume of 353.64 million.

title: Batavia Prosperindo Internasional to set up stock split with 1:20 ratio
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII) will initiate the stock split with 1:20 ratio to increase its stock liquidity.

title: United Tractors acquires geothermal company for IDR 1.26 trillion
body: JAKARTA. PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) through its subsidiary, PT Energia Prima Nusantara (EPN), has acquired a geothermal power plant company called PT Supreme Energy Rantau Dedap (SERD).

title: UOB pairs up with Garuda Indonesia to introduce GIUC card
body: PT Bank UOB Indonesia joins hands with PT Garuda Indonesia Tbk (GIAA) and Mastercard to introduce Garuda Indonesia UOB Credit Card (GIUC), which combines the perks of credit card spending and rewards from mileage system.

title: Four new investors acquire shares of Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama (AKKU)
body: PT Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama Tbk (AKKU), a business engaged in general goods and services trading, welcomed four new investors on Wednesday, March 6.

title: ARKO’s net profit dropped 25.79%
body: Throughout 2023, the profit of PT Arkora Hydro Tbk (ARKO) declined 25.79% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 39.10 billion from IDR 52.66 billion in 2022, the year in which ARKO debuted in the board.

title: Foreign transaction rises: net foreign volume closed at -843.78 million shares
body: Foreign buying and selling volumes rose on Thursday, March 7, compared to the previous trading day. Foreign investors bought a total of 4.20 billion shares, while they sold 5.04 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -843.78 million shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) was ranked first on the top sell list, with shares sold totaling 2.80 billion and a net volume of -668.87 million.

title: ADHI’s profit soared 163%, scoring IDR 214 billion
body: Net profit of PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) reportedly increased 163% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 214 billion in 2023 from the net profit in 2022 of IDR 81.24 billion.

title: Losses worsened, Sepatu Bata divests assets for IDR 64 billion
body: PT Sepatu Bata Tbk (BATA) has divested its assets, in the form of land and building in South Jakarta titled Graha Bata, with transaction value of IDR 64 billion.

title: Indonesian gov't to seek IDR 24 trillion in next week's SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Wednesday (13/3), with an indicative target of IDR 24 trillion.

title: VKTR's net profit dropped 89% due to high operational expenses
body: PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR), Bakrie Group's electric vehicle (EV) trading and manufacturing company, reported net profit of IDR 5.43 billion throughout 2023.

title: Indodana Finance to work with BTPN to extend service range
body: PT Indodana Multi Finance (Indodana Finance), a fintech company formerly known as Triprima Multifinance, announced its latest partnership with PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) to expand the scope of its service.

title: Focusing on commercial and SMEs, PermataBank to aim credit growth of 7% to 9%
body: After scoring slight increase in credit in 2023, PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) sets up a moderate target for its credit growth in 2024 of 7% to 9%.

title: Lontar Papyrus offers IDR 1.17 trillion bonds with highest coupon of 11.25%
body: PT Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper Industry, a pulp and tissue producer owned by the Sinarmas Group, will issue Shelf Registration Bonds II Phase III/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1.17 trillion.

title: Zurich Assets now owns 6.74% of Estee Gold Feet (EURO) after purchasing 171 million shares
body: By acquiring 171.78 million shares through PT Danatama Makmur Sekuritas on Tuesday, March 5, foreign investor Zurich Assets International Ltd. became a new investor in PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO). This investor currently owns 6.74% of the company that provides aerosol filling services.

title: BUMA secures facility to pay off loans
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), obtained an approval regarding the amendment and the transfer of loan facility from two of its creditors, PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) and PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Foreign buy volume almost hit 4 billion shares, with a net foreign surplus of 36.65 million shares
body: Foreign buying volume on Wednesday, March 6, nearly approached 4 billion shares, or 3.90 billion shares to be exact. With a foreign sales volume of 3.86 billion shares, net foreign ended up with a 36.65 million-share surplus. The purchase of 147.46 million shares of coal mining company PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), for a net volume of 120.58 million shares, began the list of share purchase transactions.

title: Sukuk auction slows down, incoming bids stuck on IDR 17.05 trillion
body: The incoming bids in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk last Monday (5/3) hit IDR 17.05 trillion, 14.2% year-on-year (yoy) lower than the incoming bids recorded on February 20, 2024, which reached IDR 19.88 trillion.

title: As foreign sales volume increases, net foreign volume falls to -331.52 million.
body: Foreign investors increased their share sale transactions on Tuesday, March 5, resulting in a foreign sell volume of 3.46 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume totaled only 3.13 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume to -331.52 million. The largest share transaction was made with the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling 1.15 billion shares with a net volume of -193.72 million.

title: Permata Bank to boost its fee-based income this year
body: PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI), widely known as PermataBank, aims to secure revenue increase through its fee-based income growth in 2023. As of 2023, PermataBank reported 16% contribution from fee-based income to its total revenue.

title: Revenue soared, Cisarua Mountain Dairy’s net profit hit 17% growth
body: PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy Tbk (CMRY) booked net profit of IDR 1.24 trillion throughout 2023, growing 17% year-on-year (yoy), driven by its quite solid performance in its revenue.

title: Bakrie Group’s oil and gas company discovers new natural gas source worth IDR 1.57 trillion
body: EMP Bentu Limited, a subsidiary of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), the operator and full owner of interest participation of Bentu Block, has reportedly discovered a new gas-in-place source of 126 billion cubic feet from its drilling activity in CEN-01 gas well.

title: WIKA to hold general meeting for Sukuk Mudharabah Phase I 2020
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) will hold its fourth General Meeting of Sukuk Holders (GMSU) related to Shelf Registration Sukuk Mudharabah I Phase I 2020 on April 4, 2024.

title: GPF sells over a billion shares of GoTo Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO)
body: While shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) are regularly sold by GOTO Peopleverse Fund, on Monday, March 4, this investor sold an incredible quantity of shares. Its ownership dropped from 5.28% to 5.19% as a result of releasing more than 1.05 billion GOTO shares.

title: FWD to raise portion in BRI Life
body: FWD Management Holding, an insurance company from Hong Kong, raises its ownership portion in PT Asuransi BRI Life (BRI Life) to 43.96%.

title: BEKS gained profit of IDR 26.59 billion
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Banten Tbk (BEKS) managed to turn the tide, scoring profit of IDR 26.59 billion in 2023, improving from 2022’s loss of IDR 239.28 billion.

title: TCPI secures IDR 15 billion for floating barge service
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) obtains a contract of floating barge service for temporary storage of oil fuel in LTT Bengalon Port, East Kalimanan, worth IDR 15 billion.

title: T. Permadi Rachmat now owns 5.12% of Adi Sarana (ASSA) after purchasing 188 million shares
body: An individual investor, T. Permadi Rachmat, began the month of March by purchasing 188.84 million shares of PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA) on Friday, March 3. He completed this transaction through the securities of PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk and PT Bahana Sekuritas, which promptly transferred ownership of 5.12% of the issuer that provided transportation and logistics services to him.

title: PPRE’s profit slipped 20.38%
body: PT PP Presisi Tbk (PPRE) recorded net profit of IDR 80.21 billion throughout 2023, down 20.38% from the profit in 2022 of IDR 100.75 billion.

title: Doubling income, BBYB still at loss of IDR 573 billion
body: Despite the report of 100% growth in revenue, PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) still failed to score net profit at the end of December 2023 and must be satisfied with a loss of IDR 573 billion.

title: Up 21.12%, Adira Finance bagged IDR 1.94 trillion of profit
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) reportedly secured net profit of IDR 1.94 trillion throughout 2023, increasing 21.12% from the net profit in 2022 of IDR 1.60 trillion.

title: Bank Mega to ready 70% of net profit as dividend, hitting IDR 2 T
body: Shareholders of PT Bank Mega Tbk (MEGA) agreed upon cash dividend distribution plan worth IDR 2.46 trillion for the fiscal year 2023, taken out of the net profit of IDR 3.51 trillion.

title: Save for gold, Antam to aim commodity production increase in 2024
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM), a mining company listed as member of MIND ID, reveals its commodity production and sales target in 2024.

title: Provident Investasi Bersama readies rights issue of 8.65 billion shares for IDR 3.62 trillion
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) will initiate the capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as a rights issue, by offering 8.56 billion new shares.

title: Credit grew 22.7%, Bank Nationalnobu’s profit hit IDR 141.5 billion
body: PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk (NOBU) reported fantastic growth in credit distribution, revenue, as well as net profit in 2023.

title: Commercial insurance industry’s assets reach IDR 903.07 trillion
body: The Financial Services Authority (OJK) reveals that the assets of commercial insurance industry had reached IDR 903.07 trillion in January 2024.

title: SGER’s hydrogen peroxide plant of USD 50 million to enter construction stage
body: The construction of hydrogen peroxide plant owned by PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk (SGER) has reportedly entered the construction stage.

title: Skyrocketing revenue boosted DRMA's net profit by 57.6% in 2023
body: PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk (DRMA), an automotive spare part and component manufacturer, reported skyrocketing net profit in 2023, soaring 57.6% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 625.5 billion in December 2023.

title: BNI sets up dividend 42.68% higher to IDR 10.45 trillion
body: Shareholders of PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) agreed upon cash dividend allocation for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 10.45 trillion during the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) yesterday (4/3).

title: PTPP attributed net profit to parent entity of IDR 481.36 billion
body: The performance PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) has consistently grown within these past three years.

title: Diagnos Laboratorium reported its first loss since debut
body: PT Diagnos Laboratorium Utama Tbk (DGNS), a medical laboratory service provider under PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS), booked a loss of IDR 13.65 billion in 2023.

title: Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares accounted for 53% of foreign sell; net foreign volume is -355.29 million shares
body: On Monday, March 4, foreign investors were selling large amounts of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). GOTO shares were sold for 1.79 billion shares, or approximately 53.71% of total foreign sales volume, for a net volume of -261.62 million shares. The foreign sell volume this time was 3.34 billion shares, while the foreign buy was 2.99 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -355.29 million shares.

title: Dunia Virtual Online to offer 510 million shares in IPO
body: PT Dunia Virtual Online Tbk (AREA), a data centre provider, will issue its initial public offering (IPO) of 510 million shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: BRI to distribute remaining dividend IDR 35.43 trillion
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) will channel out the remaining amount of final dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 35.43 trillion.

title: Down 51.42%, PTBA collected profit of IDR 6.10 trillion
body: The profit of PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) reportedly declined as far as 51.42% year-on-year (yoy) throughout 2023, resulting from revenue slippage of 9.75% and a higher cost of revenue.

title: Temas’s net profit slipped 42.62% yoy
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), a logistic and transportation company with the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, recorded net profit of IDR 782.6 billion in 2023, dropping 42.62% year-on-year (yoy).

title: BJBR to channel IDR 116.3 trillion of credits in 2023, profit down by 25%
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR) reported significant shrinkage in its net profit by 25% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.7 trillion at the end of 2023.

title: NICE opened the week with 23.49% surge to top gainers
body: At the closing bell today (4/3), PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) was seen arriving at ID 920 per share, increasing 23.49% from the closing bell on last Friday (1/3) of IDR 745 per share.

title: Bagging IDR 6.79 trillion, JSMR reported 147.37% surge in profit
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) booked revenue of IDR 21.31 trillion in 2023, soaring 299.36% from IDR 16.58 trillion seen in the same period in 2022.

title: SCCO to stock split at 1:4 ratio
body: Shareholders of PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk (SCCO) agree upon the stock split plan with a ratio of 1:4, meaning that 1 share will be split into 4 shares with the same value.

title: Promoting film industry, Jababeka to launch Movieland set catalogue
body: PT Jababeka Tbk (KIJA), the developer of Jababeka industrial zone, has introduced Movieland catalogue, featuring 30 movie shooting locations to accommodate the needs of film and television industry in Indonesia.

title: Telkom to transfer data centre business for USD 219 million to NeutraDC Singapore
body: Telekomunikasi Indonesia Pte. Ltd. (TelinSG), a subsidiary of PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM), has reportedy sold its data centre business to NeutraDC Singapore Pte. Ltd. (NDSG).

title: Stock-based plan dominates unit-linked life insurance products
body: The stock-based unit-linked insurance plan, also known as stock-based unit-linked products become the most developed product within the industry.

title: Boy Thohir amd two new investors purchase billions of shares of Essa Industries (ESSA)
body: On Thursday, February 29, businessman Garibaldi Thohir, also known as Boy Thohir, acquired 1.47 billion shares in PT Essa Industries Indonesia Tbk (ESSA). Boy's ownership of the LPG and ammonia refinery companies increased from 5.55% to 14.14% as a result of this spending. Two new investors also purchased a significant amount of ESSA shares this time around. PT Akraya International purchased 1.29 billion shares, or the equivalent of 7.5% ownership. Subsequently, 1.20 billion ESSA shares were purchased by individual investor T. Permadi Rachmat, giving him a final ownership stake of 7.02%.

title: Life insurance’s mutual fund assets down to IDR 78.2 trillion
body: The mutual fund assets in Indonesian life insurance industry continued to decline. Within the past 3 years, they have shrunk by 52.71%.

title: Bank Tabungan Negara is projected to share dividend of IDR 700 billion
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara (Persero) Tbk (BBTN), a state-owned bank, is predicted to set up cash dividend distribution of IDR 700 billion, which will be taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: Elnusa to set up capex of IDR 526 billion to drive business growth
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA), a subsidiary of PT Pertamina Hulu Energi (PHE) integrated in the sub-holding of upstreaming business of Pertamina, prepares capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 526 billion this year.

title: PANI booked 96.76% surge to IDR 273 billion of profit
body: The performance of PT Pantai Indak Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) has soared high, sporting revenue growth of 274% and profit growth of 96.76% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023.

title: Buana Finance to obtain another IDR 765 billion facility from Bank Danamon
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a consumer financing company listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) since 1990, has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 765 billion from PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk (BDMN).

title: BWPT’s profit skyrocketed 912.84% in 2023
body: Despite the slowing down in the revenue throughout 2023, the net profit of PT Eagle High Plantations Tbk (BWPT) reported a 912.84% upturn from its performance in 2022.

title: Production thrives, PGEO saw 28% profit surge
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO), an entity under Pertamina Group engaged in the geothermal energy industry, reported 28% year-on-year (yoy) profit surge at the end of 2023 to USD 163.57 million.

title: Share buying and selling transactions are slightly different; net foreign volume is almost 75 million pieces in surplus
body: On Friday, March 1, foreign share buying and selling transactions were not much different, at around 2 billion shares each. The foreign buying volume was 2.12 billion shares, whereas the foreign selling volume was 2.04 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume stood at 74.99 million shares. The most purchased shares this time were those of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with approximately 708.84 million shares and a net volume of 179.57 million shares.

title: Closing the weekend, ARII shares climbs top gainers
body: PT Atlas Resources Tbk (ARII) shares rose 24.76% until the close of transactions, which put this issuer at the top of the Top Gainers on Friday (1/3).

title: ROTI’s net profit down arrived at IDR 333.29 billion, down 22.88%
body: The performance of PT Nippon Indosari Corporindo Tbk (ROTI) declined in 2023, sporting revenue and profit decrease of 2.92% and 22.88% year-on-year (yoy) each.

title: HEAL to increase capex by 67%, mostly allocated to hospital expansion
body: PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the managing company of Hermina hospital network, is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of approximately IDR 2 trillion for 2024.

title: Ifishdeco to keep supporting a struggling subsidiary with IDR 6.4 billion capital
body: PT Ifishdeco Tbk (IFSH), a nickel mining company with total land concession of over 3 thousand hectares, has channelled extra capital of IDR 6.4 billion to its subsidiary, PT Patrindo Jaya Makmur (PJM).

title: Japfa saw 34.5% decline in net profit, the lowest since 2021
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA) booked net profit of IDR 929.72 billion throughout 2023, down 34.5% year-on-year (yoy) or from 2022, due to increased operational expenses.

title: Two issuers welcome Trukindo Persada as a new investor

This made PT Trukindo Persada Sejahtera a new investor in these two issuers. It currently holds 8.2% of EURO through purchases conducted by PT Lotus Andalan Sekuritas and PT KB Valbury Sekuritas. In addition, this investor bought shares through five different securities firms, giving him control over 10.9% of ITMA.

title: Over 7.5 billion shares were purchased; the net foreign volume was 629 million shares in surplus
body: At the end of February, the total number of shares purchased by foreign investors reached amazing heights. International buyers acquired 7.57 billion shares and sold roughly 6.94 billion on Thursday, February 29. This time, the net foreign volume remained in surplus at 629.46 million shares, even though the sales volume was also quite substantial. Around 2.72 billion shares of technology issuer PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the shares with the highest purchase volume, and its net volume was almost 600 million shares. Additionally, a sizeable amount of PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) shares were bought, totaling 1.60 billion shares with a net volume of 103.95 million.

title: EXCL bagged profit of IDR 1.28 trillion
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) collected current year’s net profit of IDR 1.28 trillion in 2023, up approximately 1.45% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 1.21 trillion in 2022.

title: February inflation reached 2.75%, BPS: triggered by rice price surge
body: Inflation in February 2024 soared 2.75% year-on-year (yoy) and 0.37% month-on-month (MoM), as stated in Indonesia Statistics (BPS) issued today (1/3).

title: ADRO to allocate capex of USD 700 million this year
body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of USD 600 to 700 million in 2024.

title: Multitrend Indo to transfer out 23.3 million treasury shares
body: PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY), a retailer of several child and infant products’ brands, will issue a sale of shares gained from a buyback or treasury stock sale of 23.3 million shares.

title: Up 34.62%, KICI becomes top gainers
body: Shares of PT Kedaung Indah Can Tbk (KICI) rose 34.62% until the closing bell in the afternoon on Thursday (29/2). This achievement pushed this can packaging producer issuer to reach the top of top gainers.

title: SIMP net profit slips 39%
body: PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk (SIMP) recorded a 39% decline in net profit throughout 2023 due to the decline in the average price of palm oil products. CPO production volume fell 4% to 708 thousand tons and Fresh Fruit Bunches (FFB) fell 1% to 2.78 million tons.

title: Insurance to await BI’s decision before rebalancing investment fund
body: Insurance industry opts to direct investment funds to government securities (SBN) following the expectation of global interest rate decline in the next couple of months.

title: Declining 87.91%, ANJT bagged USD 2.62 million of net profit
body: he net profit of PT Astindo Nusantara Jaya Tbk (ANJT) significantly shrank 87.91% to USD 2.62 million throughout 2023 from the 2022 net profit of USD 21.72 million.

title: Divesting portion in GLVA, EPK to rake in IDR 11.33 billion
body: PT Elsiscom Prima Karya (EPK) collects fresh funds of IDR 11.33 billion after divesting 27.5 million of its shares in PT Galva Technologies Tbk (GLVA) in a series of transaction last week.

title: Two issuers gain fresh investment from Majukarya Mandiri
body: On Tuesday, February 27, PT Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia decided to purchase new shares from two different issuers. At first, this investor purchased 161.37 million shares of the cosmetics and home appliances manufacturer PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO). It gained control of 6.33% of the company through purchases conducted by three securities firms. Additionally, this investor purchased 62.18 million shares, or 6.22% control, in PT Sumber Energi Andalan Tbk (ITMA), a consulting services provider for the mining and energy industries. This transaction was carried out via four distinct securities firms.

title: PNM to issue IDR 1.67 trillion bond for working capital boost
body: PT Permodalan Nasional Madani (PNM), a financing service company owned by PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), will issue Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 1.67 trillion.

title: More than 5 billion shares were bought and sold by foreigners, leaving a 40.85 million share net volume surplus
body: On Wednesday, February 28, there were more than 5 billion shares purchased and sold by foreigners. Specifically, 5.71 billion shares were purchased by foreign investors, and 5.67 billion shares were sold, leaving a small surplus of 40.85 million shares in the net foreign volume.

title: Foreign selling volume surges: net foreign volume falls drastically to -1.12 billion shares
body: On Tuesday, February 27, foreign investors were actively selling shares, making the foreign sales volume surge to around 4.15 billion shares. With foreign buying volume at only 3.02 billion shares, net foreign volume dropped dramatically to -1.12 billion shares. As on the previous day, the most sold shares were those of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with 2.09 billion shares sold and a net volume of -1.04 billion shares.

title: BRI reigns supreme in profitability among jumbo banks in 2023
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), one of the big four banks with market capitalisations of over IDR 100 trillion, reported the highest net profit among others in 2023.

title: Maybank Indonesia saw 18.5% profit growth to IDR 1.74 trillion in 2023
body: PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII), a private bank with total assets of IDR 171.8 trillion, booked net profit of IDR 1.74 trillion in 2023.

title: IKN projects prompt growth in general insurance premium
body: General Insurance Association of Indonesia (AAUI) reported that Nusantara Capital City (IKN) projects have triggered surge in industry premium in 2023.

title: FIRE arrived at top gainers
body: The stock price of PT Alfa Energi Investama Tbk (FIRE) shifted IDR 28 higher at yesterday’s (28/2) closing bell.

title: Provident Investasi Bersama to issue jumbo bond, eyeing IDR 1.25 trillion
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM), an investment holding company of Saratoga Group, will issue the Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase II Year 2024 worth IDR 1.25 trillion.

title: Panca Mitra Multiperdana to issue 258.83 million shares in private placement
body: PT Panca Mitra Multi Perdana Tbk (PMMP), a company engaged in shrimp processing and wholesale trading industry, will issue a capital increase without pre-emptive rights, also known as a private placement.

title: Wood segment faced downturn, DSNG's profit down 30% in 2023
body: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG), a palm plantation and wood manufacturing company, reported net profit of IDR 841.7 billion in 2023, which was 30% lower than IDR 1,2 trillion set in 2022.

title: Foreign investors, including GOTO Peopleverse Fund, are actively selling shares
body: Monday, February 26, which marked the beginning of the final week of February, was signalled by foreign investors who were busy selling shares on the stock market. Starting with the sale of 28.42 million shares of technology issuer PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) by GOTO Peopleverse Fund, it was followed by DB Spore SES CLT A/C For NTAsian Discovery Master Fund which sold 13.37 million shares of financing issuer PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN). Furthermore, 3.50 million shares of PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk (MTEL), a provider of telecommunication infrastructure, were sold by Citibank Singapore S/A on behalf of the Government of Singapore.

title: 1.18 billion Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares are sold up, and net foreign volume falls to -495.94 million
body: On Monday, February 26, foreign investors sold the most shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). A total of 1.18 billion GOTO shares were sold, for a net volume of -580.47 million. This share sale contributed to the foreign sale volume, which totaled 3.13 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was only 2.64 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume to -495.94 million shares.

title: INDY gains strength on the board after subsidiaries completed divestment
body: The stock price of PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) was seen increasing two days after this company concluded the sale of subsidiaries’ shares yesterday (26/2).

title: GGRM’s subsidiary to manage Kediri-Tulungagung Toll Road
body: PT Surya Sapta Agung Tol (SSAT), a subsidiary of PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM), officially becomes the Business Operational Unit for Kediri-Tulungagung Toll Road for the next 50 years.

title: Gov’t to schedule state sukuk auction of IDR 12 trillion next week
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk with an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion next Tuesday (5/3).

title: AKRA to put in another IDR 130 billion investment on domestic shipping business
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) has allocated extra capital worth IDR 130 billion to PT AKR Sea Transport (AST), a subsidiary engaged in the domestic shipping business.

title: AVIA reported 17.35% profit growth in 2023
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA) booked net profit attributable to the parent entity of IDR 1.64 trillion in 2023, increasing 17.35% from the 2022 net profit of IDR 1.4 trillion.

title: Tiktok acquiring 75% Tokopedia: GOTO’s gain or loss?
body: After becoming the public’s hot topic since late 2023, PT GOTO Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) finally sent official words regarding the acquisition of Tokopedia by the giant video platform from China, Tiktok.

title: Hitting a slump, ESSA’s net profit down 75.06%
body: The performance of PT ESSA Industries Indonesia Tbk (ESSA) tumbled down throughout 2023, compared to impressive record it set in 2022.

title: Jaya Ancol to share dividend of IDR 51.19 billion, up 10.34%
body: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk (PJAA) will distribute cash dividend of IDR 51.19 billion for the fiscal year 2023, growing 10.34% from 2022 dividend of IDR 46.39 billion.

title: Pertamina Geothermal Energy to carry out MESOP worth IDR 163.3 billion
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO), a subsidiary of PT Pertamina (Persero) engages in the geothermal power plant business, will initiate its Management and Employee Stock Option Program (MESOP) Phase I worth IDR 163.3 billion.

title: Price went up 13.60%, Indosat to issue 20,900 treasury shares
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT), a telecommunication service company controlled by Ooredoo Hutchison Asia Pte. Ltd., will sell the shares repurchased in a buyback.

title: Revenue slowing down, Golden Eagle Energy’s profit slipped 32.5%
body: PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk (SMMT), a coal mining company under Geo Energy Resources from Singapore, recorded net profit of IDR 244.44 billion throughout 2023.

title: SUN auction today reaches IDR61.04 trillion
body: The number of bids entered in the auction of Government Securities (SUN) on Tuesday (27/2) today reached IDR 61.04 trillion, according to the Directorate General of Financing and Risk Management (DJPPR) of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Insurance companies prefer to invest in SBN
body: The life insurance industry recorded total investment assets placed in government securities (SBN) reaching IDR 182.23 trillion. This amount is equivalent to 33.67% of the assets of the insurance industry incorporated in the Indonesian Life Insurance Association (AAJI).

title: Astra net profit jumps 17%, ready to distribute dividend IDR 421 per share
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) recorded a consolidated net profit of IDR 33.84 trillion by the end of 2023. The growth in profit performance was dominated by the infrastructure and logistics, financial services, and automotive business lines.

title: BBN becomes KETR's new controller
body: PT Bahtera Bintang Nusantara (BBN) will become the new indirect controller of PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk (KETR) after the mandatory tender of 300,979,000 shares.

title: Bank Sumut to set up dividend of IDR 592.06 billion
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Sumatera Utara (BSMT) plans a distribution of cash dividend of IDR 592.06 billion or 80% of total net profit in 2023 of IDR 740.07 billion.

title: UNTR’s profit down 3.75% to IDR 22.13 trillion
body: The revenue of PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) grew 4.02% year-on-year (yoy), but the profit slowed down 3.75% yoy throughout 2023.

title: Fibre optic idle, IBST and MORA enter affiliate transaction
body: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk (IBST) is initiating an affiliate transaction with PT Mora Telematika Indonesia Tbk (MORA) or Moratelindo regarding sale and purchase of fibre optic worth IDR 15.7 billion.

title: Life insurance premium hit IDR 177.66 trillion in 2023, down 7.1%
body: Indonesian Life Insurance Association (AAJI) recorded insurance premium of all industry players reaching IDR 177.66 trillion throughout 2023. This premium income was 7.1% lower than the same period in 2022.

title: Operating expenses soar, Matahari's net profit slumps 51.2%
body: The net profit of PT Matahari Department Store Tbk (LPPF), a retail company owned by the Lippo Group, fell by 51.2% throughout 2023 due to high operating expenses.

title: Bakrie Kalila Investment released 721 million shares of Energi Mega (ENRG), reducing its stake to 32%
body: PT Bakrie Kalila Investment released its ownership of 721.15 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), an issuer involved in the exploration and trading of oil and gas, on Friday, February 23. PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk and PT RHB Sekuritas Indonesia were the two securities companies used in the share sale, which resulted in an instant decrease in Bakrie Kalila's ownership percentage from 35.67% to 32.76%.

title: Citra Borneo Utama secured credit facility of IDR 1 trillion from BRI
body: PT Citra Borneo Utama Tbk (CBUT), the issuer engaged in the downstream process of palm refinery sector, has obtained a credit facility from PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) or BRI worth IDR 1 trillion.

title: Stock dropped 12.21% in a year, Japfa decides on shares buyback of IDR 350 billion
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA), an animal feed and processed food manufacturer, will issue a shares buyback with a budget set to IDR 350 billion.

title: PCC rules Judicial Release in favour of GIHF
body: Paris Commercial Court (PCC) has ruled on the Judicial Release in favour of Garuda Indonesia Holiday France S.AS (GIHF) for the appeal submitted by Greylag Goose Leasing 1410 and 1446 Designated Activity Company (Greylag Entities).

title: Gov’t claims spot as Vale’s controller, 5 to enter management
body: The Indonesian government, through state-owned holding of mining, MIND ID, has signed a sales and purchase agreement (SPA) regarding the 14% divestment of PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) last Monday (26/2).

title: Foreign selling volume increases: net foreign volume closed at minus 856.25 million shares
body: Foreign investors increased their share-selling activities on Friday, February 23, with a foreign selling volume of 3.26 billion shares sold. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only 2.41 billion shares, with net foreign closing at -856.25 million shares. The greatest share sale was done to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), where foreign investors sold up to 1.32 billion shares for a net volume of -773.89 million shares.

title: BRI to issue Green Bonds of IDR 2.5 trillion
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) will issue Shelf-Registration Green Bond I Phase III Year 2024 worth IDR 2.5 trillion on March 7-8, 2024.

title: CAKK earns IDR 36.22 billion from land sale in Karawang
body: PT Cahayaputra Asa Keramik Tbk (CAKK) received IDR 36.22 billion from the sale of 97,905 m2 of vacant land in Ciampel, Karawang, West Java.

title: Revenue skyrocketed 126.73%, ACST managed to press losses
body: PT Acset Indonusa Tbk (ACST) suppressed losses throughout 2023 due to a 126.73% jump in revenue from 2022.

title: Mandiri (BMRI) now a minority shareholder in Inhealth Insurance
body: PT Bahana Pembinaan Usaha Indonesia (Persero) or known as Indonesia Financial Group (IFG) ensures that PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk remains a minority shareholder in PT Asuransi Jiwa Inhealth Indonesia (Mandiri Inhealth).

title: Woori Bank Korea ready to pour IDR 3.6 trillion fresh funds in SDRA rights issue
body: Woori Bank Korea has expressed its willingness to take part in the rights issue held by PT Bank Woori Saudara 1906 Tbk (SDRA).

title: Samindo Resources took an 83% stake in Transkon Jaya (TRJA) after purchasing 148 million shares
body: PT Samindo Resources Tbk, the company that owns the majority of PT Transkon Jaya Tbk (TRJA), increased its hold on this car rental issuer by acquiring an additional 148.09 million shares. As a result of this deal, which was carried out by PT Mirae Asset Sekuritas Indonesia, Samindo's ownership percentage rose from 74% to 83.81%. Additionally, PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa Tbk (RALS), the issuer that runs supermarkets and department stores, commenced another share buyback, this time for 3.70 million shares.

title: Jhon Veter now owns 5.11% of Pulau Subur (PTPS) after purchasing 110 million shares
body: On Wednesday, February 21, individual investor Jhon Veter Firdaus Reagan acquired 110.82 million PT Pulau Subur Tbk (PTPS) shares. With this purchase, he immediately controls 5.11% of the issuer in the palm oil industry. The securities company facilitating this transaction was PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia.

title: ASGR pocketed IDR 141 billion in profit
body: PT Astra Graphia Tbk's (ASGR) profit soared 45% to IDR 141 billion throughout 2023 from its profit in 2022 of IDR 97.07 billion. The increase in profit was driven by revenue growth and financial income.

title: Foreign buying volume hits 2.86 billion shares; net foreign volume is 418.49 million shares surplus
body: On Thursday, February 22, share purchases by foreign investors resulted in a foreign purchase volume of 2.86 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only 2.44 billion shares, which then generated a net foreign volume of 418.49 million shares. On the top buy list, shares of the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) ranked first after 248.42 million shares were purchased, for a net volume of 230.35 million.

title: Hexindo Adiperkasa booked 25.3% growth, profit rose to USD 43.8 million
body: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk (HEXA), a heavy equipment trading and rental company, scored net profit of USD 43.8 million in 2023, increasing 25.3% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Setting up an LNG station, CGAS invests IDR 161.5 billion
body: PT Citra Nusantara Gemilang Tbk (CGAS) will put in investment worth IDR 161.5 billion to build an LNG station with a capacity of 1.5 million standard cubic feet per day (MMSCFD).

title: IFG to acquire 70% of Mandiri Inhealth from Bank Mandiri and Kimia Farma
body: PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) and PT Kimia Farma Tbk (KAEF) officially divested their portions in PT Asuransi Jiwa Inhealth Indonesia (Mandiri Inhealth), equal to 70%, to PT Asuransi Jiwa IFG (IFG Life).

title: GIAA to be consolidated to InJourney
body: The Ministry of State-Owned Enterprises (SOEs) is known to review the plan of incorporating PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA), as a subsidiary, to PT Aviasi Pariwisata Indonesia (InJourney), a state-owned holding in the aviation and tourism sector.

title: AKRA to prepare several strategies to boost 2024 performance
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA), an oil and gas distributor company with the highest market capitalisation, has set up several strategies to further bolster its business performance this year.

title: Revenue strengthened, BFIN’s net profit slipped 9% in 2023
body: Although its revenue grew by a double digit, PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) failed to record the same win for its net profit at the end of 2023, booking net profit of only IDR 1.6 trillion or 9% year-on-year (yoy) decrease.

title: Autopedia Sukses Lestari to form a pawnbroker company, investing IDR 2.5 billion
body: PT Autopedia Sukses Lestari Tbk (ASLC), an auction and used car inspection, has allocated IDR 2.5 billion of fresh funds to introduce the latest subsidiary called PT Autopedia Gadai Jabar (AGJ).

title: Nippon Indosari Corpindo to offer 38.9 million treasury shares
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI) will carry out the transfer of treasury stock consisting of 38,908,000 shares gained from the buyback that has taken place for the past two years.

title: BPII to receive dividend income of IDR 49.24 billion
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII) bagged dividend income of IDR 49.24 billion for the fiscal year 2023 from its subsidiary, PT Batavia Prosperindo Aset Manajemen (BPAM).

title: Indorama booked loss of USD 40.8 million
body: The performance of PT Indorama Synthetics Tbk (INDR) saw a downturn compared to last year of profit.

title: Japan in recession, Indonesia to rethink on Samurai Bond release
body: The Indonesian government is currently re-reviewing the plan of issuance of Yen-denominated bond, or Samurai Bonds, amidst the recession in Japan.

title: Govt to hold another SUN auction next week, aiming for IDR 24 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold a Government Securities (SUN) auction on Thursday (29/2) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 24 trillion.

title: TUGU optimistic on underwriting income increase
body: Comprehensive profit of PT Asuransi Tugu Pratama Indonesia Tbk (TUGU) has soared over 200% year-on-year (yoy) in December 2023 (unaudited) to IDR 1.29 trillion.

title: Good news for Astra following electric car incentive from gov't
body: The Indonesian government will give incentives for electric cars, as stated in Regulation of the Ministry of Finance (PMK) No. 8/2024 regarding the Government-Borne Value Added Tax (PPN DTP) of Electric Cars.

title: Telkomsat investing IDR 3.5 trillion for Satelit Merah Putih 2, Jasindo gives full coverage
body: PT Asuransi Jasa Indonesia (Jasindo) confirmed that the investment value of total IDR 3.5 trillion for Satelit Merah Putih 2 will be fully covered by the company.

title: Bukaka Teknik to establish new subsidiary in Oman, investing IDR 122 billion
body: PT Bukaka Teknik Utama Tbk (BUKK), through one of its subsidiaries, PT Bukaka Mega Investama, has formed a new subsidiary called Bukaka International LLC in Oman.

title: Domestic car sales decline, AUTO’s net profit still grew 38.9% in 2023
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) booked net profit of IDR 1.84 trillion in 2023, up 38.9% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Telkom spent IDR 3.5 trillion for Satelit Merah Putih 2
body: PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) has invested IDR 3.5 trillion through one of its subsidiaries, PT Telkom Satelit Indonesia (Telkomsat), to develop Satelit Merah Putih 2 launched last Wednesday (21/2).

title: AALI’s profit dropped 38.84%
body: The performance of PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) weakened in 2023 compared to 2022.

title: Down 22.72%, ARNA’s net profit arrived at IDR 445.29 billion
body: PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk (ARNA) booked net profit of IDR 445.29 billion throughout 2023, down 22.72% from 2022 net profit of IDR 581.55 billion.

title: Net foreign volume stays in the green zone at 276.16 million shares
body: On Wednesday, February 21, foreign net volume appeared to stay in the green zone, at approximately 276.16 million shares. This number represents the difference between foreign buying volume (3.11 billion shares) and foreign selling volume (2.83 billion shares).

title: Fitch estimates 70% sharia units of insurance to spin off
body: Fitch Ratings estimates only 70% of sharia business units of insurance currently existing will remain standing following the new policy of capital requirement and spin-off to become a full fledge unit.

title: IMR Asia Holding to acquire 83% Fortune Indonesia's shares
body: IMR Asia Holding Pte. Ltd, a holding company registered in Singapore, plans to acquire 83% of the shares of PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk (FORU).

title: BTPN eyes IDR 6.73 trillion in rights issue, SMBC and BCA to take part
body: PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) will carry out a capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue, of 2.58 billion shares.

title: Holding a private placement, SLJ Global (SULI) welcomes new investors
body: PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI), the issuer in the forestry and wood industry sector, conducted a private placement of 1,326,481,737 new shares. On Monday, February 20, market hints showed the moves of three new SULI investors who decided to participate in this corporate action. Mataram Limited was the first, having recently acquired 554.04 million shares via PT Binaartha Sekuritas, giving it a 10.25% ownership stake. Additionally, after purchasing 296.52 million SULI shares, PT Pelayaran Sentra Arung Makmur now owns 5.49% of the shares. PT Borneo Karya Persada is the next significant shareholder, having purchased 286.66 million shares, or 5.31% of the total.

title: Net foreign volume reaches 1.06 billion shares as foreign buy volume significantly surpasses foreign sell
body: Foreign investors' share-buy transactions kept increasing until Tuesday, February 20, when the volume of foreign purchases reached around 3.15 billion shares. This figure was significantly higher than the foreign sales volume, which was just about 2.09 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume reached a surplus of 1.06 billion shares. One of the factors contributing to the increase in foreign buying volume was the purchase of 1.03 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with a net volume of 597.32 million shares.

title: Transcoal Pacific’s subsidiary to secure credit facility of IDR 1.34 trillion
body: PT Sentra Makmur Lines (SML), a subsidiary of PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) engaged in the shipping industry, has signed a credit facility agreement with one of state-owned banks.

title: Satu Visi Putra sets IPO price to IDR 120, aiming for IDR 73.8 billion
body: PT Satu Visi Putra Tbk (VISI), a wholesale trading company for advertising and printing industry, has set the price of its initial public offering (IPO) of IDR 120 per share.

title: Indomobil and VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas to accelerate EC adoption
body: PT IMG Sejahtera Langgeng (IMGSL), a subsidiary of PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS), has signed a strategic partnership agreement with PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR).

title: ITMG’s profit shrank 58.33% in 2023
body: The net profit of PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) decreased 58.33% throughout 2023 compared to the same period in 2022. The decline of profit was driven by lower revenue.

title: Comparing assets of BRI, BNI, BCA, and Mandiri’s insurance subsidiaries
body: Banks with Core Capital over IDR 70 trillion or KBMI IV have insurance subsidiaries. Then, how huge is the contribution of insurance business in consolidated assets of jumbo banks?

title: Up 28.5% yoy, CIMB Niaga scored IDR 6.55 trillion of profit in 2023
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA), the private bank with the third highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, booked net profit of IDR 6.55 trillion in 2023, increasing 28.5% year-on-year (yoy).

title: GEMS’s subsidiary to secure facility of USD 7.5 million from Eximbank
body: PT Borneo Indobara (BIB) and PT Barasentosa Lestari (BSL), 2 subsidiaries owned by PT Golden Energy Mines Tbk (GEMS), has obtained a financing facility from Indonesia Eximbank of total USD 7.5 million.

title: After purchasing 405 million shares, Satya Mulia Gema currently owns 10.42% of Polychem (ADMG)
body: On Monday, February 19, PT Satya Mulia Gema Gemilang acquired 405.35 million shares of PT Polychem Indonesia Tbk (ADMG), a company that manufactures chemicals and polyester. This new investor received immediate control over 10.42% of the shares through this transaction, which was handled by PT Equity Sekuritas Indonesia. In addition, the department store issuer PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa (RALS) initiated a further buyback action of 5.42 million shares, while PT Arthakencana Rayatama acquired 4.86 million shares of PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA), which distributes fuel.

title: Jasindo Insurance covers risk for Merah Putih 2 Satellite
body: PT Asuransi Jasa Indonesia (Jasindo Insurance) became the risk management partner of Telkomsat's Merah Putih 2 Satellite, a subsidiary of PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM).

title: One month after debut, these stocks successfully scale up
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) and PT Multi Spunindo Jaya Tbk (MSJA) were seen rising after making its debut in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Jokowi reshuffles cabinet again, installing 2 former armed forces
body: President of Republic of Indonesia, Joko Widodo (Jokowi), once again reshuffles its ministers by appointing 2 former personnels of Indonesian National Armed Forces (TNI) as Coordinating Minister of Political, Legal, and Security Affairs and Minister of Agrarian Affairs and Spatial Planning.

title: State sukuk auction recorded total bids of IDR 19.88 trillion
body: The total incoming bids submitted in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or state sukuk yesterday (20/2) were recorded at IDR 19.88 trillion.

title: AHAP rose to top gainers
body: PT Asuransi Harta Aman Pratama Tbk (AHAP) recorded increase of 34.12% at the end of yesterday’s (20/2) trading session.
